30410.title: Everybody’s Talkin’ at Me: Levels of Majority Language Acquisition by Minority Language Speakers
30410.zh_title: 人人都在对我说话：少数语言使用者对多数语言的习得水平
30410.authors: William Brock, Bo Chen, Steven N. Durlauf, Shlomo Weber
30410.abstract: Immigrants in economies with a dominant native language exhibit substantial heterogeneities in language acquisition of the majority language. We model partial equilibrium language acquisition as an equilibrium phenomenon. We consider an environment where heterogeneous agents from various minority groups choose whether to acquire a majority language fully, partially, or not at all. Different acquisition decisions confer different communicative benefits and incur different costs. We offer an equilibrium characterization of language acquisition strategies and find that partial acquisition can arise as an equilibrium behavior. We also show that a language equilibrium may exhibit insufficient learning relative to the social optimum. In addition, we provide a local stability analysis of steady state language equilibria. Finally, we discuss econometric implementation of the language acquisition model and establish identification conditions.
30410.zh_abstract: 在拥有主导性母语的经济体中，移民在多数语言习得方面表现出显著的异质性。我们将局部均衡的语言习得建模为一种均衡现象。我们考虑一个环境，其中来自不同少数群体的异质性主体选择完全、部分或完全不习得多数语言。不同的习得决策带来不同的沟通收益并产生不同的成本。我们提供了语言习得策略的均衡特征描述，并发现部分习得可以作为均衡行为出现。我们还表明，相对于社会最优水平，语言均衡可能表现出学习不足。此外，我们提供了稳态语言均衡的局部稳定性分析。最后，我们讨论了语言习得模型的计量经济学实现，并建立了识别条件。
30410.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：C72, D61, J15, Z13

30409.title: Infinite Debt Rollover in Stochastic Economies
30409.zh_title: 随机经济中的无限债务展期
30409.abstract: This paper shows that there is more scope for a borrower to engage in a sustainable infinite debt rollover (a “Ponzi scheme”) when interest/growth rates are stochastic. In this context, I prove that the relevant “r vs. g” comparison uses the yield r_{long} to an infinite-maturity zero-coupon bond. I show that r_{long} is lower than the (risk-neutral) expectation of the short-term yield when it is variable, and that r_{long} is close to the minimal realization of the short-term yield when it is highly persistent. The paper applies these results to illustrative heterogeneous agent dynamic stochastic general equilibrium models to obtain weak sufficient conditions for the existence of public debt bubbles.
30409.zh_abstract: 本文表明，当利率/增长率随机时，借款人进行可持续无限债务展期（“庞氏骗局”）的空间更大。在此背景下，我证明相关的“r与g”比较使用的是无限期零息债券的收益率r_long。我表明，当短期收益率可变时，r_long低于其（风险中性）预期，并且当短期收益率高度持久时，r_long接近其最小实现值。本文将这些结果应用于说明性的异质性主体动态随机一般均衡模型，以获得公共债务泡沫存在的弱充分条件。

30408.title: Industry Choice and within Industry Earnings Effects of Career and Technical Education
30408.zh_title: 职业与技术教育的行业选择及行业内收入效应
30408.authors: Eric Brunner, Shaun Dougherty, Stephen Ross
30408.abstract: We examine the effect of attending stand-alone technical high schools on industry of employment and within industry earnings premiums among students that applied to the Connecticut Technical Education and Career System (CTECS). Regression discontinuity estimates suggest that admission shifts male students towards working in higher paying industries, broadly defined, that align with CTECS programs of study but has a much more modest impact on female students. Surprisingly, industry earnings premiums are similar and sometimes larger for female students in traditionally male dominated industries like manufacturing and construction. Both male and female students are also more likely to work in specific industries that have a close occupational match to CTECS programs, and this match helps explain a substantial portion of the CTECS earnings premium for males in manufacturing and construction. Finally, male students admitted to a CTECS school who do not initially place in higher paying industries are more likely to transition into higher paying industries over time, and as a result, eventually experience these earnings premiums.
30408.zh_abstract: 我们考察了就读独立技术高中对申请康涅狄格技术教育与职业系统（CTECS）的学生在就业行业以及行业内收入溢价方面的影响。断点回归估计表明，入学促使男生转向与CTECS学习项目相符的、广义上收入更高的行业，但对女生的影响则小得多。令人惊讶的是，在制造业和建筑业等传统上由男性主导的行业中，女生的行业收入溢价相似，有时甚至更大。男生和女生也更有可能在与CTECS项目职业匹配度高的特定行业工作，这种匹配有助于解释CTECS在制造业和建筑业中对男生的收入溢价中的很大一部分。最后，被CTECS学校录取但最初未进入高收入行业的男生，随着时间的推移更有可能转向高收入行业，并最终获得这些收入溢价。

30407.title: Welfare Reform and the Quality of Young Children's Home Environments
30407.zh_title: 福利改革与幼儿家庭环境质量
30407.authors: Ariel Kalil, Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Ofira Schwartz-Soicher, Nancy Reichman
30407.abstract: This study investigates effects of welfare reform in the U.S., a major policy shift that increased employment of low-income mothers and reliance on their own earnings instead of cash assistance through the welfare system, on the quality of the home environments they provide for their preschool-age children. Using empirical methods designed to identify plausibly causal effects, we estimate effects of welfare reform on validated survey and observational measures of maternal behaviors that support children’s cognitive skills and emotional adjustment and material goods that parents purchase to stimulate their children’s skill development. The results suggest that welfare reform did not affect the amount of time and material resources mothers devoted to cognitively stimulating activities with their young children but was significantly associated with approximately 0.3–0.4 standard deviation lower scores on provision of emotional support, with stronger effects for mothers with low human capital. The findings provide evidence that maternal work incentives as implemented by welfare reform came at a cost to children in the form of lower quality parenting and underscore the importance of considering quality, and not just quantity, in assessing the effects of maternal work incentive policies on parenting and children’s home environments.
30407.zh_abstract: 本研究调查了美国福利改革的影响——这是一项重大的政策转变，增加了低收入母亲的就业，并使其更多依赖自身收入而非福利系统的现金援助——对她们为学龄前儿童提供的家庭环境质量的影响。使用旨在识别合理因果效应的实证方法，我们估计了福利改革对经过验证的调查和观察性测量的影响，这些测量涉及支持儿童认知技能和情绪调整的母亲行为，以及父母为刺激子女技能发展而购买的物质商品。结果表明，福利改革并未影响母亲投入在幼儿认知刺激活动上的时间和物质资源，但与情感支持提供得分显著降低约0.3-0.4个标准差相关，对人力资本较低的母亲影响更强。这些发现提供了证据，表明福利改革所实施的母亲工作激励以降低育儿质量为代价，并强调了在评估母亲工作激励政策对育儿和儿童家庭环境影响时，考虑质量而不仅仅是数量的重要性。

30406.title: The Impacts of Crises on the Trilemma Configurations
30406.zh_title: 危机对三难困境配置的影响
30406.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Menzie D. Chinn, Hiro Ito
30406.abstract: The “monetary trilemma” – the hypothesis that full monetary policy autonomy, exchange rate stability, and financial openness cannot simultaneously be achieved – has long been studied. Recently, holding international reserves (IR) has become an important policy instrument, insuring against liquidity shortages. We find that countries’ policy mixes are diverse, and have varied over time, sometimes in response to crises. We illustrate how the policy combinations changed drastically after the Asian Financial Crisis (AFC). In contrast, the Global Financial Crisis did not lead to a drastic change in the policy arrangements. We find that countries that faced large terms of trade shocks or negative economic growth during the crisis increased IR holding, post-AFC. Countries that had negative growth during the crisis also tended to pursue greater exchange rate flexibility and financial openness. This finding is true for commodity, but not manufactured goods, exporters. Countries with large current account deficits tend to be more sensitive to economic growth at the time of the AFC. Countries that are under IMF stabilization programs or those with sovereign wealth funds tended to hold more IR. In general, countries increased their IR holdings after the GFC, but did not otherwise respond concurrently to crisis conditions.
30406.zh_abstract: “货币三难困境”——即完全的货币政策自主权、汇率稳定和金融开放无法同时实现的假设——长期以来一直受到研究。最近，持有国际储备（IR）已成为一种重要的政策工具，用于防范流动性短缺。我们发现各国的政策组合是多样化的，并且随时间而变化，有时是对危机的反应。我们说明了在亚洲金融危机（AFC）之后，政策组合如何发生了剧烈变化。相比之下，全球金融危机并未导致政策安排发生剧烈变化。我们发现，在危机期间面临巨大贸易条件冲击或经济负增长的国家，在AFC后增加了IR持有量。在危机期间出现负增长的国家也倾向于追求更大的汇率灵活性和金融开放。这一发现对商品出口国成立，但对制成品出口国不成立。经常账户赤字大的国家在AFC时期往往对经济增长更为敏感。处于国际货币基金组织稳定计划下或拥有主权财富基金的国家倾向于持有更多IR。总体而言，各国在GFC后增加了IR持有量，但并未同时对危机状况做出其他反应。

30405.title: A Helping Hand Goes a Long Way: Long-Term Effects of Counselling and Support to Workfare Program Participants
30405.zh_title: 援手助长远：对工作福利计划参与者的咨询与支持的长期效应
30405.authors: Gustavo J. Bobonis, Aneta Bonikowska, Philip Oreopoulos, W. Craig Riddell, Steven P. Ryan
30405.abstract: We study the medium- and long-run impacts of the Canada Self-Sufficiency Project (SSP) Plus program, which randomly offered intensive employment support services for up to three years to long-term welfare recipients eligible for temporary earnings subsidies. We examine whether this intervention—designed to address both economic and psychosocial barriers to finding and retaining desirable employment—produced long-run changes in individuals’ socioeconomic trajectories. We link study participants to high-frequency survey data and to their federal tax and employer-employee matched records for up to 20 years following random assignment. The intensive services treatment resulted in a 20–27 percent increase in participants’ annual earnings over the 20-year period and sustained increases in full-time employment during the first decade post-intervention. As potential mechanisms, treated individuals engaged in more job search and job-to-job transitions and secured employment in higher-wage jobs and at higher-paying firms.
30405.zh_abstract: 我们研究了加拿大自给自足项目（SSP）Plus计划的中长期影响，该计划随机向有资格获得临时收入补贴的长期福利领取者提供长达三年的密集就业支持服务。我们考察了这种旨在解决寻找和保持理想就业的经济和心理社会障碍的干预措施，是否在长期内改变了个人的社会经济轨迹。我们将研究参与者与高频调查数据以及随机分配后长达20年的联邦税收和雇主-雇员匹配记录联系起来。密集服务处理导致参与者在20年期间的年收入增加20-27%，并在干预后的第一个十年内持续增加全职就业。作为潜在机制，接受处理的个体进行了更多的求职和工作转换，并在工资更高的工作和薪酬更高的公司获得了就业。

30404.title: The Effect of College and University Endowments on Financial Aid, Admissions, and Student Composition
30404.zh_title: 学院和大学捐赠基金对助学金、招生和学生构成的影响
30404.abstract: This paper examines how private college and university endowments affect financial aid, admissions selectivity, and the economic and racial composition of incoming students. Because endowment levels are a function of expenditures and alumni giving, which are endogenous to the outcomes of interest, the design exploits changes in endowments stemming from variation in investment returns over time and across peer institutions. Estimates reveal that growing endowments generate large and persistent increases in spending overall and for instruction, student services, and administration in particular. However, wealthier colleges and universities do not increase the number of students they serve or the fraction of students receiving aid, and only modestly increase the generosity of aid packages. Instead, these institutions offset higher freshman yield rates by becoming more selective and enrolling fewer low-income students and students of color. Overall, colleges and universities appear to use greater endowment wealth to increase spending and to become more selective, resulting in higher institutional rankings, but do not increase the size or diversity of their student bodies. The results are important in light of the preferential tax treatment of endowments and interest in increasing access to elite postsecondary education for underserved populations.
30404.zh_abstract: 本文考察了私立学院和大学的捐赠基金如何影响助学金、招生选择性以及入学学生的经济和种族构成。由于捐赠基金水平是支出和校友捐赠的函数，而这些支出和捐赠与所关注的结果是内生的，因此设计利用了因投资回报随时间变化以及同行机构间差异而产生的捐赠基金变动。估计显示，捐赠基金的增长总体上带来了支出的持续大幅增加，特别是在教学、学生服务和行政管理方面。然而，更富裕的学院和大学并没有增加他们服务的学生数量或接受资助的学生比例，只是适度增加了资助包的慷慨程度。相反，这些机构通过提高选择性、招收更少的低收入学生和有色人种学生来抵消更高的新生报到率。总体而言，学院和大学似乎利用更大的捐赠财富来增加支出并变得更具选择性，从而提高了机构排名，但并未增加学生群体的规模或多样性。鉴于捐赠基金享有优惠税收待遇以及增加弱势群体获得精英高等教育机会的兴趣，这些结果具有重要意义。

30403.title: Investing in Lending Technology: IT Spending in Banking
30403.zh_title: 投资于贷款技术：银行业的IT支出
30403.authors: Zhiguo He, Sheila Jiang, Douglas Xu, Xiao Yin
30403.abstract: Banks’ lending technology hinges on their handling of soft and hard information in dealing with different types of credit demand. Through assembling a novel dataset on banks’ investment in information technologies (IT), this paper provides concrete empirical evidence on how banks adapt their lending technologies. We find investment in communication IT is associated with improving banks’ ability to produce and transmit soft information, while investment in software IT helps enhance banks’ hard information processing capacity. We exploit policies that affect geographic regions differentially to show causally that banks respond to an increased demand for small business credit (mortgage refinance) by increasing their spending on communication (software) IT spending. We also find that the entry of fintech induces commercial banks to increase their investment in IT—more so in the software IT category.
30403.zh_abstract: 银行的贷款技术取决于它们在处理不同类型信贷需求时对软信息和硬信息的运用。通过汇编关于银行信息技术（IT）投资的新数据集，本文提供了银行如何调整其贷款技术的具体实证证据。我们发现，通信IT投资与提高银行生产和传递软信息的能力相关，而软件IT投资有助于增强银行的硬信息处理能力。我们利用对不同地理区域产生不同影响的政策，因果性地表明，银行通过增加通信（软件）IT支出来应对小企业信贷（抵押贷款再融资）需求的增加。我们还发现，金融科技公司的进入促使商业银行增加IT投资——尤其是在软件IT类别中。
30403.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, PR；JEL：G21, G51, O12, O32

30402.title: Free-Riding Yankees: Canada and the Panama Canal
30402.zh_title: 搭便车的美国人：加拿大与巴拿马运河
30402.authors: Sebastian Galiani, Luis F. Jaramillo, Mateo Uribe-Castro
30402.abstract: We study the impact of the Panama Canal on the development of Canada’s manufacturing sector from 1900 to 1939. Using newly digitized county-level data from the Census of Manufactures and a market-access approach, we exploit the plausibly exogenous nature of this historical episode to study how changes in transportation costs influence the process of structural transformation and manufacturing productivity. Our reduced-form estimates show that lowered shipping costs increased manufacturing employment as a share of the population by increasing the number of manufacturing establishments, though not their average size, capital intensity, or skilled labor share. Manufacturing revenues grew 9% more in counties with market access gains at the 75th percentile, compared to counties with 25th percentile gains. Productivity grew by 13% more. These effects persist when we consider general equilibrium effects: the closure of the Canal in 1939 would result in economic losses equivalent to 1.86% of GDP, chiefly as a by-product of the restriction of the country’s access to international markets. Altogether, these results suggest that the Canal substantially altered the economic geography of the Western Hemisphere in the first half of the twentieth century.
30402.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1900年至1939年间巴拿马运河对加拿大制造业发展的影响。利用新数字化的县级制造业普查数据以及市场准入方法，我们借助这一历史事件看似外生的特性，探讨运输成本变化如何影响结构转型过程和制造业生产率。我们的简化形式估计表明，降低的运输成本通过增加制造业企业数量提高了制造业就业人口占比，但并未影响企业的平均规模、资本密集度或熟练劳动力份额。与市场准入收益处于第25百分位的县相比，处于第75百分位的县的制造业收入增长了9%，生产率增长了13%。当我们考虑一般均衡效应时，这些影响依然存在：1939年运河关闭将导致相当于GDP 1.86%的经济损失，这主要是该国进入国际市场受到限制的副产品。总体而言，这些结果表明，巴拿马运河在20世纪上半叶显著改变了西半球的经济地理格局。

30401.title: Growth Elasticities of Poverty Reduction
30401.abstract: Thirty years ago, Nanak Kakwani provided elegant nonparametric formulae for the point elasticities of measures of poverty with respect to changes in the mean of the distribution of income, thus analytically linking the poverty measures to key macroeconomic aggregates. Numerous insights are found in Kakwani’s elasticities. However, the literature on poverty and growth since then has revealed that the impacts of economic growth on poverty, as observed in practice, can be substantially lower than suggested by Kakwani’s elasticities; the reasons include rising inequality, measurement errors, discrepancies between surveys and national accounts, and changing ideas about what “poverty” means in specific contexts. Nor should Kakwani’s elasticities be treated as structural parameters. Rather, they can vary over time and place, and in systematic ways that merit closer attention.
30401.zh_abstract: 三十年前，Nanak Kakwani提供了优雅的非参数公式，用于计算贫困度量相对于收入分配均值变化的点弹性，从而将贫困度量与关键宏观经济总量分析性地联系起来。Kakwani的弹性中蕴含了众多洞见。然而，自那以来的贫困与增长文献表明，实践中观察到的经济增长对贫困的影响可能远低于Kakwani弹性所暗示的水平；原因包括不平等加剧、测量误差、调查与国民账户之间的差异，以及关于“贫困”在特定背景下含义的观念变化。Kakwani的弹性也不应被视为结构参数。相反，它们可能随时间和地点而变化，并且以值得更密切关注的系统性方式变化。

30400.title: Computerized Machine Tools and the Transformation of US Manufacturing
30400.zh_title: 计算机化机床与美国制造业的转型
30400.authors: Leah Platt Boustan, Jiwon Choi, David Clingingsmith
30400.abstract: The diffusion of computerized machine tools in the mid-20th century was a pivotal step in the century-long process of factory automation. We build a novel measure of exposure to computer numerical control (CNC) using initial variation in tool types across industries and differential shifts toward CNC by type. Industries more exposed to CNC from 1970-2010 increased labor productivity and reduced production employment. Workers in more exposed labor markets adjusted by shifting from metal to non-metal manufacturing. Union members were shielded from this job loss, and some workers returned to school to retrain.
30400.zh_abstract: 20世纪中期计算机化机床的普及是长达一个世纪的工厂自动化进程中的关键一步。我们利用各行业初始刀具类型的差异以及不同类型刀具向计算机数控（CNC）转变的差异，构建了一个新的CNC暴露度衡量指标。1970年至2010年间，CNC暴露度更高的行业提高了劳动生产率并减少了生产性就业。在暴露度更高的劳动力市场中，工人通过从金属制造业转向非金属制造业来适应。工会成员免受这种失业的影响，一些工人则重返学校接受再培训。

30430.title: The Impact of Female Teachers on Female Students' Lifetime Well-Being
30430.zh_title: 女教师对女学生终身福祉的影响
30430.authors: David Card, Ciprian Domnisoru, Seth G. Sanders, Lowell Taylor, Victoria Udalova
30430.abstract: It is widely believed that female students benefit from being taught by female teachers, particularly when those teachers serve as counter-stereotypical role models. We study education in rural areas of the US circa 1940--a setting in which there were few professional female exemplars other than teachers--and find that female students were more successful when their primary-school teachers were disproportionately female. Impacts are lifelong: female students taught by female teachers were more likely to move up the educational ladder by completing high school and attending college, and had higher lifetime family income and increased longevity.
30430.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为，女学生受益于女教师的教导，尤其是当这些教师充当反刻板印象的榜样时。我们研究了约1940年美国农村地区的教育——这是一个除了教师之外几乎没有其他职业女性榜样的环境——并发现当女学生的小学教师中女性比例过高时，她们更为成功。这种影响是终身的：由女教师教导的女学生更有可能在教育阶梯上攀升，完成高中并进入大学，并且拥有更高的终身家庭收入和更长的寿命。

30429.title: If You Build it, Will They Vaccinate? The Impact of COVID-19 Vaccine Sites on Vaccination Rates and Outcomes
30429.zh_title: 如果你建了，他们会接种吗？新冠疫苗接种点对接种率和结果的影响
30429.authors: John Brownstein, Jonathan H. Cantor, Benjamin Rader, Kosali I. Simon, Christopher M. Whaley
30429.abstract: Safe and effective vaccines have vastly reduced the lethality of the COVID-19 pandemic worldwide, but disparities exist in vaccine take-up. Although the out-of-pocket price is set to zero in the U.S., time (information gathering, signing up, transportation and waiting) and misinformation costs still apply. To understand the extent to which geographic access impacts COVID-19 vaccination take-up rates and COVID-19 health outcomes, we leverage exogenous, pre-existing variation in locations of retail pharmacies participating the U.S. federal government’s vaccine distribution program through which over 40% of US vaccine doses were administered. We use unique data on nearly all COVID-19 vaccine administrations in 2021. We find that the presence of a participating retail pharmacy vaccination site in a county leads to an approximately 26% increase in the per-capita number of doses administered, possibly indicating that proximity and familiarity play a substantial role in vaccine take-up decisions. Increases in county-level per capita participating retail pharmacies lead to an increase in COVID-19 vaccination rates and a decline in the number of new COVID-19 cases, hospitalizations, and deaths, with substantial heterogeneity based on county rurality, political leanings, income, and race composition. The relationship we estimate suggests that averting one COVID-19 case, hospitalization, and death requires approximately 25, 200, and 1,500 county-level vaccine total doses, respectively. These results imply a 9,500% to 22,500% economic return on the full costs of COVID-19 vaccination. Overall, our findings add to understanding vaccine take-up decisions for the design of COVID era and other public health interventions.
30429.zh_abstract: 安全有效的疫苗已大幅降低了全球新冠疫情的致死率，但疫苗接种率存在差异。尽管在美国自付价格为零，但时间（信息收集、注册、交通和等待）和错误信息成本仍然存在。为了解地理可及性在多大程度上影响新冠疫苗接种率和健康结果，我们利用了参与美国联邦政府疫苗分发计划的零售药店的现有外生位置差异，该计划承担了美国超过40%的疫苗剂量。我们使用了2021年几乎所有新冠疫苗接种的独特数据。我们发现，一个县内存在参与计划的零售药店接种点，会导致人均接种剂量增加约26%，这可能表明邻近性和熟悉度在疫苗接种决策中起着重要作用。县级人均参与计划的零售药店数量的增加，导致新冠疫苗接种率上升，以及新增新冠病例、住院和死亡人数下降，且这种效应因县的农村程度、政治倾向、收入和种族构成而存在显著异质性。我们估计的关系表明，避免一例新冠病例、住院和死亡分别需要大约25、200和1500剂县级疫苗总剂量。这些结果表明，新冠疫苗接种的全部成本可获得9500%至22500%的经济回报。总体而言，我们的发现增进了对疫苗接种决策的理解，有助于设计新冠时期及其他公共卫生干预措施。

30428.title: Is Secessionism Mostly About Income or Identity? A Global Analysis of 3,003 Subnational Regions
30428.zh_title: 分离主义主要是关于收入还是身份？对3003个次国家区域的全球分析
30428.authors: Klaus Desmet, Ignacio Ortuño-Ortín, Ömer Özak
30428.abstract: This paper analyzes whether the propensity to secede by subnational regions responds mostly to differences in income per capita or to distinct identities. We explore this question in a quantitative political economy model where people's willingness to finance a public good depends on their income and identity. Using high-resolution economic and linguistic data for the entire globe, we predict the propensity to secede of 3,003 subnational regions in 173 countries. We validate the model-based predictions with data on secessionist movements, state fragility, regional autonomy, and conflict, as well as with an application to the dissolution of the Soviet Union. Counterfactual analysis strongly suggests that identity trumps income in determining a region's propensity to secede. Removing identity differences reduces the average support for secession from 7.5% to 0.6% of the population.
30428.zh_abstract: 本文分析了次国家区域的分离倾向主要取决于人均收入差异还是不同的身份认同。我们在一个定量政治经济学模型中探讨了这个问题，在该模型中，人们为公共产品提供资金的意愿取决于他们的收入和身份。利用全球的高分辨率经济和语言数据，我们预测了173个国家中3003个次国家区域的分离倾向。我们使用关于分离主义运动、国家脆弱性、区域自治和冲突的数据，以及一个关于苏联解体的应用，来验证基于模型的预测。反事实分析强烈表明，在决定一个区域的分离倾向时，身份认同胜过收入。消除身份差异将使支持分离的人口比例从7.5%降至0.6%。
30428.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D70, F02, F52, H77, P00

30427.title: Team Incentives and Lower Ability Workers: A Real-Effort Experiment
30427.zh_title: 团队激励与低能力工人：一项真实努力实验
30427.authors: Richard B. Freeman, Xiaofei Pan, Xiaolan Yang, Maoliang Ye
30427.abstract: Despite a large literature on team incentives, studies on teams in a purely financial sense are limited. In such environments, team members independently engage in tasks with identifiable individual contributions, while their compensation is partially linked to team outputs. We con-ducted an experiment of such scenario with three distribution schemes (equal sharing, individ-ual piece rate, and winner-takes-all) and examined these schemes both with and without a team threshold. Our results showed the surprising power of equal sharing on improving team produc-tivity compared to winner-takes-all and individual piece-rate, contradicting the predictions of the standard economics theory. Our findings reveal that the higher team output observed under equal sharing was driven by the increased productivity of less able workers. This could be at-tributed to an explanation of guilt aversion and cannot be illuminated by several alternative theories. We also found that participants preferred piece rate over the other schemes. Yet, the presence of a team threshold highlighted the importance of cooperation, leading to a greater preference for equal sharing. Our findings suggest that organizations with workers of varying abilities are likely to benefit from an appropriate equal sharing component tailored to their re-sponsiveness to sharing in rewards.
30427.zh_abstract: 尽管关于团队激励的文献很多，但关于纯粹财务意义上团队的研究有限。在这种环境中，团队成员独立从事任务，个人贡献可识别，而他们的报酬部分与团队产出挂钩。我们针对这种情景进行了一项实验，涉及三种分配方案（平均分配、个人计件工资和赢家通吃），并分别在有和没有团队门槛的情况下检验了这些方案。我们的结果显示了平均分配在提高团队生产力方面相对于赢家通吃和个人计件工资的惊人力量，这与标准经济学理论的预测相矛盾。我们的发现表明，在平均分配下观察到的更高团队产出是由能力较低工人生产力的提高驱动的。这可以归因于内疚厌恶的解释，而几种替代理论无法阐明这一点。我们还发现，参与者更喜欢计件工资而非其他方案。然而，团队门槛的存在凸显了合作的重要性，导致对平均分配的偏好增强。我们的发现表明，拥有不同能力工人的组织很可能受益于根据其对奖励分享的反应性量身定制的适当平均分配成分。
30427.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：C91, C92, D23, J33

30426.title: Race and Redistribution in the United States: An Experimental Analysis
30426.zh_title: 美国的种族与再分配：一项实验分析
30426.authors: Jesper Akesson, Robert W. Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe, Itzhak Rasooly
30426.abstract: Scholars have suggested that White American support for welfare is related to beliefs about the racial composition of welfare recipients. While a host of observational studies lend credence to this view, it has not yet been tested using the tools of randomized inference. In this study, we do this by conducting two incentive-compatible experiments (n = 9,775) in which different participants are randomly given different signals about the share of welfare recipients who identify as Black and White. Our analysis yields four main findings. First, 86% of respondents greatly overestimate the share of welfare recipients who are Black, with the average respondent overestimating this by almost a factor of two. Second, White support for welfare is inversely related to the proportion of welfare recipients who are Black—a causal claim that we establish using treatment assignment as an instrument for beliefs about the racial composition of welfare recipients. Third, just making White participants think about the racial composition of welfare recipients reduces their support for welfare. Fourth, providing White respondents with accurate information about the racial composition of welfare recipients (relative to not receiving any information) does not significantly influence their support for welfare.
30426.zh_abstract: 学者们提出，美国白人对福利的支持与他们对福利领取者种族构成的信念有关。虽然大量观察性研究支持这一观点，但尚未使用随机推断工具进行检验。在本研究中，我们通过进行两项激励相容实验（n=9,775）来做到这一点，其中不同的参与者被随机给予关于福利领取者中黑人和白人比例的不同信号。我们的分析得出四个主要发现。首先，86%的受访者大大高估了福利领取者中黑人的比例，平均受访者高估了近两倍。其次，白人对福利的支持与福利领取者中黑人的比例呈负相关——这是一个我们利用处理分配作为福利领取者种族构成信念的工具变量所建立的因果主张。第三，仅仅让白人参与者思考福利领取者的种族构成就会降低他们对福利的支持。第四，向白人受访者提供关于福利领取者种族构成的准确信息（相对于不提供任何信息）并不会显著影响他们对福利的支持。

30425.title: Price Spillovers and Specialization in health Care: The Case of Children's Hospitals
30425.zh_title: 医疗保健中的价格溢出效应与专业化：以儿童医院为例
30425.abstract: Specialty hospitals tend to negotiate higher commercial insurance payments, even for relatively routine procedures with comparable clinical quality across hospital types. How specialty hospitals can maintain such a price premium remains an open question. In this paper, we examine a potential (horizontal) differentiation effect in which patients perceive specialty hospitals as sufficiently distinct from other hospitals, so that specialty hospitals effectively compete in a separate market from general acute care hospitals. We estimate this effect in the context of routine pediatric procedures offered by both specialty children’s hospitals as well as general acute care hospitals, and we find strong empirical evidence of a differentiation effect in which specialty children’s hospitals appear largely immune to competitive forces from non-children’s hospitals.
30425.zh_abstract: 专科医院往往能协商获得更高的商业保险支付，即使是对于临床质量在不同医院类型间可比的相对常规手术也是如此。专科医院如何维持这种价格溢价仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们考察了一种潜在的（横向）差异化效应，即患者认为专科医院与其他医院有显著区别，以至于专科医院实际上在与综合急症护理医院不同的市场中竞争。我们在儿童专科医院和综合急症护理医院都提供的常规儿科手术背景下估计了这一效应，并发现了差异化效应的有力实证证据，即儿童专科医院似乎在很大程度上不受非儿童医院竞争力量的影响。

30424.title: Place Effects and Geographic Inequality in Health at Birth
30424.zh_title: 出生地效应与出生健康的地理不平等
30424.abstract: This paper uses birth records from California and mothers who move to quantify the absolute and relative importance of birth location in early-life health. Using a model that includes mother and location fixed effects, we find that moving from a below- to an above-median birth weight location leads to a 19-gram increase in average birth weight. These causal place effects explain 16 percent of geographic variation in birth weight, with family-specific factors accounting for the remaining 84 percent. Place effects are more influential for children of non-college-educated mothers, and are most strongly correlated with local levels of pollution. The improvement in birth weight from moving to a higher-quality area compares favorably to policies that target maternal health, and could have a small, lasting effect on long-run outcomes.
30424.zh_abstract: 本文利用加利福尼亚州的出生记录和母亲迁移数据，量化了出生地点对早期生命健康的绝对和相对重要性。通过一个包含母亲固定效应和地点固定效应的模型，我们发现，从出生体重低于中位数的地区迁移到高于中位数的地区，平均出生体重增加19克。这些因果性的地点效应解释了出生体重地理差异的16%，而家庭特定因素则解释了剩余的84%。地点效应对非大学教育母亲的子女影响更大，并且与当地的污染水平相关性最强。与针对孕产妇健康的政策相比，迁移到更高质量地区带来的出生体重改善效果更优，并可能对长期结果产生微小而持久的影响。
30424.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H51, I1, I15, J13, Q53, R23

30423.title: Blue Spoons: Sparking Communication About Appropriate Technology Use
30423.zh_title: 蓝色勺子：激发关于适当技术使用的沟通
30423.authors: Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Esther Duflo, Michael Kremer, João F. Pugliese, Jonathan Robinson, Frank Schilbach
30423.abstract: An enduring puzzle regarding technology adoption in developing countries is that new technologies often diffuse slowly through the social network. Two of the key predictions of the canonical epidemiological model of technology diffusion are that forums to share information and higher returns to technology should both spur social transmission. We design a large-scale experiment to test these predictions among farmers in Western Kenya, and we fail to find support for either. However, in the same context, we introduce a technology that diffuses very fast: a simple kitchen spoon (painted in blue) to measure out how much fertilizer to use. We develop a model that explains both the failure of the standard approaches and the surprising success of this new technology. The core idea of the model is that not all information is reliable, and farmers are reluctant to develop a reputation of passing along false information. The model and data suggest that there is value in developing simple, transparent technologies to facilitate communication.
30423.zh_abstract: 关于发展中国家技术采纳的一个持久谜题是，新技术往往通过社交网络缓慢传播。经典的技术扩散流行病学模型的两个关键预测是，信息共享论坛和更高的技术回报都应能促进社会传播。我们在肯尼亚西部的农民中设计了一项大规模实验来检验这些预测，但未能找到支持任一预测的证据。然而，在同一背景下，我们引入了一种传播非常迅速的技术：一把简单的厨房勺子（涂成蓝色），用于量取化肥用量。我们开发了一个模型，既解释了标准方法的失败，也解释了这种新技术的惊人成功。该模型的核心思想是，并非所有信息都可靠，农民不愿建立传播虚假信息的声誉。模型和数据表明，开发简单、透明的技术以促进沟通具有价值。

30422.title: How Can Asset Prices Value Exchange Rate Wedges?
30422.zh_title: 资产价格如何为汇率楔子定价？
30422.abstract: When available financial securities allow investors to optimally diversify risk across countries, standard theory implies that exchange rates should reflect this behavior. However, exchange rates observed in the data deviate from these predictions. In this paper, we develop a framework to value the welfare costs of these exchange rate wedges, as disciplined by asset returns. This framework applies to a general class of asset pricing and exchange rate models. We further decompose the value of these wedges into components, showing that the ability of goods markets to respond to financial markets through exchange rate adjustment has significant implications for welfare.
30422.zh_abstract: 当可用的金融证券允许投资者在各国间最优地分散风险时，标准理论意味着汇率应反映这种行为。然而，数据中观察到的汇率偏离了这些预测。在本文中，我们开发了一个框架，以资产回报为约束，评估这些汇率楔子的福利成本。该框架适用于一般类别的资产定价和汇率模型。我们进一步将这些楔子的价值分解为各个组成部分，表明商品市场通过汇率调整对金融市场做出反应的能力对福利具有重要影响。
30422.meta: Programs：AP, IFM；JEL：F30, F31, F41, G10, G15

30421.title: The Geography of Job Tasks
30421.authors: Enghin Atalay, Sebastian Sotelo, Daniel I. Tannenbaum
30421.abstract: We introduce new measurement tools to understand the sources of earnings differences across space. Based on the natural language employers use in job vacancy text, we develop granular measures of job tasks and of worker specialization. We find that jobs in larger commuting zones involve greater interpersonal interactions and have higher computer software requirements. Between 10 and 50 percent of task and technology variation between large and small commuting zones exists within occupations. Further, workers in larger markets are more specialized within occupations. Tasks, technologies, and worker specialization account for a substantial portion of the market size premium even within occupations.
30421.zh_abstract: 我们引入了新的测量工具来理解跨地区收入差异的根源。基于雇主在职位空缺文本中使用的自然语言，我们开发了工作任务和工人专业化的精细度量。我们发现，在较大的通勤区，工作涉及更多的人际互动，并且对计算机软件的要求更高。在大型和小型通勤区之间，任务和技术差异的10%到50%存在于职业内部。此外，较大市场的工人在职业内部更加专业化。即使在职业内部，任务、技术和工人专业化也解释了市场规模溢价的很大一部分。

30420.title: Using Administrative Data to Impute Income Non-Response in Household Surveys
30420.zh_title: 利用行政数据填补住户调查中的收入无回答
30420.authors: V. Kerry Smith, Michael P. Welsh, Richard Carson, Stanley Presser
30420.abstract: Income is simultaneously one of the most important variables used by economists and the variable most likely to be missing due to item non-response. While observations that are missing income responses are often dropped from analyses, such treatment is usually inappropriate. More appropriate solutions rely on imputation based on either covariates (e.g., age and education) measured in the survey or on spatial estimates (most often for zip codes) from the American Community Survey. We describe a new spatially-based alternative using publicly available Internal Revenue Service tax data that allows estimates of zip code’s income distribution.
30420.zh_abstract: 收入既是经济学家使用的最重要变量之一，也是最可能因项目无回答而缺失的变量。虽然缺失收入回答的观测值通常被从分析中剔除，但这种处理通常是不恰当的。更合适的解决方案依赖于基于调查中测量的协变量（如年龄和教育）或基于美国社区调查的空间估计（最常见的是邮政编码层面）的插补。我们描述了一种新的基于空间的方法，利用公开可用的美国国税局税收数据，允许估计邮政编码的收入分布。

30419.title: Zoomers and Boomers: Asset Prices and Intergenerational Inequality
30419.zh_title: Zoomers与Boomers：资产价格与代际不平等
30419.abstract: We construct a perpetual youth DSGE model with aggregate uncertainty in which there are dynamically complete markets and agents have Epstein-Zin preferences. We prove that, when endowments have a realistic hump-shaped age-profile, our model has three steady-state equilibria. One of these equilibria is dynamically inefficient and displays real price indeterminacy. We estimate the parameters of our model and we find that a fourth-order approximation around the indeterminate steady-state provides the best fit to U.S. data. Our work interprets the large and persistent generational inequality that has been observed in western economies over the past century as the result of uninsurable income shocks to birth cohorts.
30419.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个具有总体不确定性的永续青年DSGE模型，其中存在动态完备市场，且代理人具有Epstein-Zin偏好。我们证明，当禀赋具有现实的驼峰形年龄分布时，我们的模型存在三个稳态均衡。其中一个均衡是动态无效率的，并表现出实际价格的不确定性。我们估计了模型的参数，并发现围绕不确定稳态的四阶近似对美国数据提供了最佳拟合。我们的工作将过去一个世纪西方经济体中观察到的大规模且持久的代际不平等解释为出生队列面临的不可保险收入冲击的结果。

30418.title: Foreign Reserves Management and Original Sin
30418.authors: Michael B. Devereux, Steve Pak Yeung Wu
30418.abstract: This paper studies the interaction between foreign exchange reserves and the currency composition of sovereign debt in emerging countries. Focusing on inflation targeting countries, we find that holdings of foreign reserves are associated with higher local currency sovereign debt, an exchange rate which is less sensitive to global shocks, and a lower exchange rate risk premium in local currency sovereign spreads. We rationalize these findings within a financially constrained model of a small open economy. The Sovereign values local currency debt as a hedge against endowment risk, but since the exchange rate tends to depreciate in times of global downturns, risk averse international investors charge an additional currency risk premium on this debt. When a country optimally uses foreign reserves to lean against the wind in response to global shocks, this dampens the response of the exchange rate, providing insurance for the global investor. By reducing the risk premium on local currency debt, foreign exchange reserves therefore facilitate a higher share of local currency debt in the sovereign portfolio. Quantitatively, we find the welfare benefits for the sovereign from optimal foreign reserves management can be very large.
30418.zh_abstract: 本文研究了新兴国家外汇储备与主权债务货币构成之间的相互作用。聚焦于通胀目标制国家，我们发现，外汇储备持有量与更高的本币主权债务、对全球冲击敏感度较低的汇率以及本币主权利差中较低的汇率风险溢价相关。我们在一个金融约束的小型开放经济模型中合理化了这些发现。主权国家将本币债务视为对冲禀赋风险的工具，但由于汇率在全球经济低迷时期倾向于贬值，风险规避的国际投资者对此类债务收取额外的货币风险溢价。当一个国家最优地利用外汇储备来应对全球冲击时，这会抑制汇率的反应，从而为全球投资者提供保险。通过降低本币债务的风险溢价，外汇储备因此促进了主权投资组合中本币债务份额的提高。在定量上，我们发现最优外汇储备管理对主权国家的福利收益可能非常大。

30417.title: Cognitive Imprecision and Stake-Dependent Risk Attitudes
30417.zh_title: 认知不精确与赌注依赖的风险态度
30417.authors: Mel Win Khaw, Ziang Li, Michael Woodford
30417.abstract: In an experiment that elicits subjects’ willingness to pay (WTP) for the outcome of a lottery, we document a systematic effect of stake sizes on the magnitude and sign of the relative risk premium, and find that there is a log-linear relationship between the monetary payoff of the lottery and WTP, conditional on the probability of the payoff and its sign. We account quantitatively for this relationship, and the way in which it varies with both the probability and sign of the lottery payoff, in a model in which all departures from risk-neutral bidding are attributed to an optimal adaptation of bidding behavior to the presence of cognitive noise. Moreover, the cognitive noise required by our hypothesis is consistent with patterns of bias and variability in judgments about numerical magnitudes and probabilities that have been observed in other contexts. We thus provide foundations for the kind of nonlinear distortions in lottery valuation posited by prospect theory, that we believe can provide an interpretation for the observed instability across contexts of estimated prospect-theoretic parameters.
30417.zh_abstract: 在一项诱导受试者对彩票结果支付意愿的实验中，我们记录了赌注大小对相对风险溢价大小和符号的系统性影响，并发现彩票的货币收益与支付意愿之间存在对数线性关系，且该关系取决于收益的概率及其符号。我们在一个模型中定量解释了这种关系及其随彩票收益概率和符号变化的方式，该模型将所有偏离风险中性出价的行为归因于出价行为对认知噪声存在的最优适应。此外，我们假设所需的认知噪声与其他情境下观察到的关于数值大小和概率判断的偏差和变异性模式一致。因此，我们为前景理论所假设的彩票估值中的非线性扭曲提供了基础，我们认为这可以为估计的前景理论参数在不同情境下观察到的稳定性缺失提供一种解释。

30416.title: Place-Based Productivity and Costs in Science
30416.zh_title: 科学领域基于地点的生产力与成本
30416.authors: Jonathan Gruber, Simon Johnson, Enrico Moretti
30416.abstract: Cities with a larger concentration of scientists have been shown to be more productive places for additional scientists to do Research and Development. At the same time, these urban areas tend to be associated with higher costs of doing research, in terms of both wages and land. While the literature on the benefits of agglomeration economies is extensive, it offers no direct evidence of how productivity gains from agglomeration compare with higher costs of production. This paper aims to shed light on the balance between local productivity and local costs in science. Using a novel dataset, we estimate place-based costs of carrying out R&D in each US metro area and assess how these place-based costs vary with the density of scientists in each area. We then compare these costs with estimates of the corresponding productivity benefits of more scientist density from Moretti (2021). Adding more scientists to a city increases both productivity and production costs, but the rise in productivity is larger than the rise in production costs. In particular, each 10% rise in the stock of scientists is associated with a 0.11% rise in costs and a 0.67% rise in productivity. This implies that firms moving from cities with a small agglomeration of scientists to cities with a large agglomeration of scientists experience productivity gains that are 6 times larger than the increase in production costs. This finding is consistent with the increased concentration of R&D activity observed over the past 30 years. However, while the productivity estimate has only modest non-linearities, the cost estimates suggest much larger non-linearities as the concentration of scientists increases. For the most concentrated R&D cities, the difference between productivity gains and cost increases is close to zero.
30416.zh_abstract: 研究表明，科学家更为集中的城市，对于其他科学家开展研发活动而言，生产力也更高。与此同时，这些城市地区在工资和土地方面，往往与研究成本较高相关联。尽管关于集聚经济收益的文献十分丰富，但并未提供直接证据来证明集聚带来的生产力提升与较高的生产成本相比孰优孰劣。本文旨在阐明科学领域中本地生产力与本地成本之间的平衡关系。利用一个新颖的数据集，我们估算了美国每个都市区开展研发活动的基于地点的成本，并评估了这些基于地点的成本如何随每个地区科学家密度的变化而变化。然后，我们将这些成本与Moretti（2021）估算的科学家密度增加所带来的相应生产力收益进行了比较。向一个城市增加更多科学家会同时提高生产力和生产成本，但生产力的提升幅度大于生产成本的上升幅度。具体而言，科学家存量每增加10%，成本上升0.11%，生产力提升0.67%。这意味着，从科学家集聚程度较小的城市迁往科学家集聚程度较大的城市的企业，其生产力提升幅度是生产成本增加幅度的6倍。这一发现与过去30年观察到的研发活动日益集中的趋势相符。然而，尽管生产力估计值仅呈现适度的非线性特征，但成本估计值表明，随着科学家集中度的提高，非线性特征更为显著。对于研发活动最集中的城市而言，生产力提升与成本增加之间的差异接近于零。
30416.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H0, J0, R0

30415.title: Environmental Economics, Regulation, and Innovation
30415.zh_title: 环境经济学、监管与创新
30415.abstract: This paper provides a primer on the economics of environmental innovation. Our intention is not to write a pure review paper, but to also provide an up-to-date textbook treatment on the issue. Thus, we start by defining the marginal costs of both emissions and of emissions abatement. We then analyze theoretically how innovation may affect marginal abatement costs. We also cover the different modelling choices with respect to how the innovation process is represented mathematically and how different environmental policy measures could affect environmental innovation. Our theoretical propositions are all illustrated with examples from the empirical literature. A special emphasis is placed on the recent literature on directed technical change and the potential impact of government intervention in the research and development choices of private firms.
30415.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于环境创新经济学的入门介绍。我们的意图并非撰写一篇纯粹的综述论文，而是就这一问题提供一份最新的教科书式论述。因此，我们首先定义了排放和减排的边际成本。然后，我们从理论上分析了创新如何可能影响边际减排成本。我们还涵盖了关于创新过程如何以数学方式表示的不同建模选择，以及不同的环境政策措施如何可能影响环境创新。我们的所有理论命题均辅以实证文献中的例子加以说明。特别强调了近期关于定向技术变革的文献，以及政府干预私营企业研发选择的潜在影响。

30414.title: Passing the Message: Peer Outreach about COVID-19 Precautions in Zambia
30414.zh_title: 传递信息：赞比亚关于COVID-19预防措施的同伴宣传
30414.authors: Alfredo Burlando, Pradeep Chintagunta, Jessica Goldberg, Melissa Graboyes, Peter Hangoma, Dean Karlan, Mario Macis, Silvia Prina
30414.abstract: During public health emergencies, spreading accurate information and increasing adherence to recommended behaviors is critical for communal welfare. However, uncertainty, mistrust, and misinformation can slow the adoption of best practices. Preexisting social networks can amplify and endorse information from authorities, and technology makes peer-to-peer messaging scalable and fast. Using text messages and small cash incentives, we test a peer-based information campaign to encourage adherence to recommended COVID-19-related health behaviors in Zambia. None of the treatments affected health behavior among primary study participants or their peers. The suggestion to pass messages to peers increases dissemination, but financial incentives do not have any additional impact.
30414.zh_abstract: 在突发公共卫生事件期间，传播准确信息并提高对推荐行为的遵从度对于公共福祉至关重要。然而，不确定性、不信任和错误信息可能会减缓最佳实践的采纳。已有的社会网络可以放大和认可来自权威机构的信息，而技术使得点对点信息传递具有可扩展性和快速性。通过短信和小额现金激励，我们在赞比亚测试了一项基于同伴的信息宣传活动，以鼓励人们遵守推荐的COVID-19相关健康行为。所有处理均未影响主要研究参与者或其同伴的健康行为。向同伴传递信息的建议增加了信息传播，但金钱激励没有产生额外影响。

30413.title: Optimal Assignment of Bureaucrats: Evidence from Randomly Assigned Tax Collectors in the DRC
30413.zh_title: 官僚的最优分配：来自刚果民主共和国随机分配税务人员的证据
30413.authors: Augustin Bergeron, Pedro Bessone, John Kabeya Kabeya, Gabriel Z. Tourek, Jonathan L. Weigel
30413.abstract: The assignment of workers to tasks and teams is a key margin of firm productivity and a potential source of state effectiveness. This paper investigates whether a low-capacity state can increase its tax revenue by optimally assigning its tax collectors. We study the two-stage random assignment of property tax collectors into teams and to neighborhoods in a large Congolese city. The optimal assignment involves positive assortative matching on both dimensions: high (low) ability collectors should be paired together, and high (low) ability teams should be paired with high (low) payment propensity households. Positive assortative matching stems from complementarities in collector-to-collector and collector-to-household match types. We provide evidence that these complementarities reflect in part high-ability collectors exerting greater effort when matched with other high-ability collectors. According to our estimates, implementing the optimal assignment would increase tax compliance by 2.94 percentage points and revenue by 26% relative to the status quo (random) assignment. Alternative policies, such as replacing low-ability collectors with new ones of average ability or increasing collectors’ performance wages, are likely incapable of achieving a similar revenue increase.
30413.zh_abstract: 将工人分配到任务和团队是企业生产力的一个关键方面，也是国家效能的一个潜在来源。本文研究了一个低能力国家是否可以通过最优分配其税务人员来增加税收收入。我们研究了在一个刚果大城市中，财产税征收人员分两阶段随机分配到团队和社区的情况。最优分配涉及在两个维度上的正向分类匹配：高（低）能力的征收人员应配对在一起，高（低）能力的团队应与高（低）支付倾向的家庭配对。正向分类匹配源于征收人员之间以及征收人员与家庭之间匹配类型的互补性。我们提供的证据表明，这些互补性部分反映了高能力征收人员在与其它高能力征收人员匹配时会付出更多努力。根据我们的估计，与现状（随机）分配相比，实施最优分配将使税收遵从度提高2.94个百分点，税收收入增加26%。其他政策，例如用平均能力的新征收人员替换低能力征收人员，或增加征收人员的绩效工资，可能无法实现类似的收入增长。

30412.title: Intergenerational Transmission of Family Influence
30412.zh_title: 家庭影响力的代际传递
30412.authors: Sadegh Eshaghnia, James J. Heckman, Rasmus Landersø, Rafeh Qureshi
30412.abstract: This paper studies intergenerational mobility—the transmission of family influence. We develop and estimate measures of lifetime resources (income and wealth) motivated by economic theory that account for generational differences in life-cycle trajectories, uncertainty, and credit constraints. These measures of lifetime resources allow us to estimate the transmission of welfare and lifetime resources at different stages of the life cycle. We compare these measures with traditional ones such as wage income and disposable income measured over narrow windows of age that are used to proxy lifetime wealth. The performance of proxy measures is poor. Parents’ expected lifetime resources are stronger predictors of many important child outcomes (including children’s own expected lifetime resources and education) than the income measures traditionally used in the literature on social mobility. Changes in patterns of educational attainment across generations explain most of the intergenerational change in life-cycle dynamics. While relative mobility is overstated by the traditional income measures, absolute upward mobility is understated. Recent generations have higher welfare and are better off compared to their parents.
30412.zh_abstract: 本文研究代际流动性——即家庭影响力的传递。我们根据经济理论开发并估算了终身资源（收入和财富）的衡量指标，这些指标考虑了代际间生命周期轨迹、不确定性和信贷约束的差异。这些终身资源衡量指标使我们能够估算生命历程不同阶段的福利和终身资源的传递。我们将这些衡量指标与传统的衡量指标进行比较，例如在较窄的年龄窗口内测量的工资收入和可支配收入，这些传统指标被用作终身财富的代理变量。代理变量的表现不佳。与社会科学流动性文献中传统使用的收入衡量指标相比，父母的预期终身资源是许多重要儿童结果（包括儿童自身的预期终身资源和教育）的更强预测因子。跨代教育成就模式的变化解释了生命周期动态中大部分的代际变化。虽然传统收入衡量指标高估了相对流动性，但绝对向上流动性却被低估了。与父母相比，最近几代人的福利更高，境况也更好。

30411.title: Microequity and Mutuality: Experimental Evidence on Credit with Performance-Contingent Repayment
30411.zh_title: 小额股权与互助：基于绩效还款的信贷实验证据
30411.authors: Francesco Cordaro, Marcel Fafchamps, Colin Mayer, Muhammad Meki, Simon Quinn, Kate Roll
30411.abstract: We conduct the first field experiment of a performance-contingent microfinance contract. A large food multinational wishes to help micro-distributors in its supply chain with the financing of a productive asset. Working with the firm in Kenya, we compare asset financing under a traditional debt contract to three alternatives: (i) a novel equity-like financing contract, (ii) a hybrid debt-equity contract, and (iii) an index-insurance financing contract. Experimental results reveal large positive impacts from the contractual innovations. These findings demonstrate the economic appeal of microfinance contracts that leverage improved observability of performance to achieve a greater sharing of risk and reward.
30411.zh_abstract: 我们进行了首个关于绩效挂钩小额信贷合同的实地实验。一家大型食品跨国公司希望帮助其供应链中的微型分销商为一项生产性资产融资。我们与该公司在肯尼亚合作，将传统债务合同下的资产融资与三种替代方案进行了比较：(i) 一种新颖的类似股权的融资合同，(ii) 一种混合债务-股权合同，以及 (iii) 一种指数保险融资合同。实验结果显示，这些合同创新带来了巨大的积极影响。这些发现证明了小额信贷合同的经济吸引力，这些合同利用对绩效观察能力的改善，实现了风险与回报的更大程度分担。

30454.title: Road Maintenance and Local Economic Development: Evidence from Indonesia’s Highways
30454.zh_title: 道路维护与地方经济发展：来自印度尼西亚高速公路的证据
30454.authors: Paul Gertler, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro, Tadeja Gracner, Alexander D. Rothenberg
30454.abstract: This paper estimates the local welfare impacts of highway maintenance investments. We instrument road quality exploiting Indonesia’s two-step budgeting process for allocating funding to local road authorities. Using comprehensive data on road quality from 1990-2007, we find evidence that better roads help manufacturers create new jobs, enabling worker transitions out of informal employment, and increasing labor income. Road quality also changes the cost of living, reducing perishable food prices but also raising housing prices. We estimate the elasticity of household welfare with respect to road quality to be 0.1 and the benefit/cost ratio for road maintenance investments to be 2.3.
30454.zh_abstract: 本文估计了高速公路维护投资对地方福利的影响。我们利用印度尼西亚向地方道路管理机构分配资金的两步预算流程来工具化道路质量。使用1990-2007年道路质量的综合数据，我们发现证据表明，更好的道路有助于制造商创造新的就业机会，使工人能够从非正规就业中转移出来，并增加劳动收入。道路质量也会改变生活成本，降低易腐食品价格，但同时也推高了住房价格。我们估计家庭福利对道路质量的弹性为0.1，道路维护投资的效益成本比为2.3。
30454.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, PE；JEL：J43, O18, R23, R42

30453.title: KFstar and Portfolio Inflows: A Focus on Latin America
30453.zh_title: KFstar与投资组合流入：聚焦拉丁美洲
30453.authors: John D. Burger, Francis E. Warnock, Veronica Cacdac Warnock
30453.abstract: Latin American portfolio inflows show a strong tendency to revert to a natural level, KF*, over medium-run horizons. Deviations of actual flows from KF* provide policymakers with a real-time predictor of future flows, sudden stops and vulnerability to global shocks. Analysis of short-run deviations of flows from KF* reveals heterogeneous drivers: commodity prices for Brazil, Chile, and Mexico; risk tolerance for Argentina, Costa Rica, and Peru.
30453.zh_abstract: 拉丁美洲的投资组合流入显示出在中期时间范围内强烈回归自然水平KF*的趋势。实际流量与KF*的偏离为政策制定者提供了未来流量、突然停止以及对全球冲击脆弱性的实时预测指标。对流量与KF*短期偏离的分析揭示了异质性驱动因素：巴西、智利和墨西哥受大宗商品价格影响；阿根廷、哥斯达黎加和秘鲁受风险容忍度影响。

30452.title: Climate Risks and FDI
30452.zh_title: 气候风险与外国直接投资
30452.abstract: Climate-related risks have increased in recent decades, both in terms of the frequency of extreme weather events (physical risk) and implementation of climate-change mitigation policies (transition risk). This paper explores whether multinational firms react to such risks by altering their presence in countries that are more affected. We measure this by examining foreign direct investment (FDI) dynamics at different levels of aggregation as well as at firm level. We propose a theoretical framework for firm production location choice that explicitly incorporates transition and physical risks. The model predicts a reduction in FDI resulting from both physical and transition risks but an ambiguous interaction effect of these risks with emission productivity of the firm. In an extensive empirical analysis we find some support for model predictions, but overall we do not find consistent evidence for statistically significant effects of physical and transition risks on FDI. However, firm-level evidence suggests that firms that are more exposed to climate risks react more negatively to physical climate risk following Paris Climate Accord. We also find that FDI outflows following extreme weather events from affected countries are smaller for industries with higher emission productivity. Our theory and empirical results point to the importance of accounting for heterogeneity in emission productivity when analyzing effects of climate risks.
30452.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，气候相关风险有所增加，无论是极端天气事件的频率（物理风险）还是气候变化减缓政策的实施（转型风险）。本文探讨跨国公司是否通过改变其在受影响更严重国家的存在来应对此类风险。我们通过考察不同加总层面以及企业层面的外国直接投资动态来衡量这一点。我们提出了一个企业生产区位选择的理论框架，该框架明确纳入了转型风险和物理风险。该模型预测，物理风险和转型风险都会导致外国直接投资减少，但这些风险与企业排放生产率之间的交互效应是不明确的。在广泛的实证分析中，我们发现了支持模型预测的一些证据，但总体而言，我们没有找到一致的证据表明物理风险和转型风险对外国直接投资具有统计上显著的影响。然而，企业层面的证据表明，在《巴黎气候协定》之后，更容易受到气候风险影响的企业对物理气候风险的反应更为负面。我们还发现，在极端天气事件之后，受影响国家的外国直接投资流出在排放生产率较高的行业中较小。我们的理论和实证结果指出了在分析气候风险影响时考虑排放生产率异质性的重要性。

30451.title: Slavery and the British Industrial Revolution
30451.zh_title: 奴隶制与英国工业革命
30451.authors: Stephan Heblich, Stephen J. Redding, Hans-Joachim Voth
30451.abstract: We provide theory and evidence on the contribution of slavery wealth to Britain’s economic development prior to the abolition of slavery in 1833. We combine data on individual slaveholders from compensation records, an exogenous source of variation in slavery wealth from weather-induced shocks to mortality of the enslaved during the middle passage, and a quantitative spatial model. Exogenous increases in slavery wealth reduce the agricultural employment share, increase the manufacturing employment share, raise the number of cotton mills, and increase property values. Quantifying our model, we find that slavery wealth raises aggregate income by the equivalent of around a decade of economic growth, and increases local income in places with the greatest involvement in slavery by more than 40 percent.
30451.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于奴隶制财富在1833年废除奴隶制之前对英国经济发展贡献的理论和证据。我们结合了来自补偿记录的个人奴隶主数据、由天气引起的奴隶在“中间通道”期间死亡率冲击所产生的外生奴隶制财富变异，以及一个定量空间模型。奴隶制财富的外生增加降低了农业就业份额，提高了制造业就业份额，增加了棉纺厂的数量，并提升了财产价值。通过量化我们的模型，我们发现奴隶制财富使总收入提高了相当于大约十年的经济增长，并在奴隶制参与度最高的地区使当地收入增加了超过40%。

30450.title: Global Sourcing and Multinational Activity: A Unified Approach
30450.zh_title: 全球采购与跨国活动：一个统一的方法
30450.authors: Pol Antràs, Evgenii Fadeev, Teresa C. Fort, Felix Tintelnot
30450.abstract: Multinational firms (MNEs) accounted for 42 percent of US manufacturing employment, 87 percent of US imports, and 84 of US exports in 2007. Despite their disproportionate share of global trade, MNEs’ input sourcing and final-good production decisions are often studied separately. Using newly merged data on firms’ trade and FDI activity by country, we show that US MNEs are more likely to import not only from the countries in which they have affiliates, but also from other countries within their affiliates’ region. We rationalize these patterns in a unified framework in which firms jointly determine the countries in which to produce final goods, and the countries from which to source inputs. The model generates a new source of scale economies that arises because a firm incurs a country-specific fixed cost that allows all its assembly plants to source inputs from that country. This shared fixed cost across plants creates interdependencies between firms’ assembly and sourcing locations, and leads to non-monotonic responses in third markets to bilateral trade cost changes.
30450.zh_abstract: 2007年，跨国公司占美国制造业就业的42%，美国进口的87%和美国出口的84%。尽管跨国公司在全球贸易中占据不成比例的份额，但其投入品采购和最终产品生产决策通常被分开研究。利用新合并的企业按国家划分的贸易和外国直接投资活动数据，我们表明美国跨国公司不仅更有可能从其拥有附属公司的国家进口，也更有可能从其附属公司所在区域内的其他国家进口。我们在一个统一框架中合理化这些模式，在该框架中，企业共同决定在哪些国家生产最终产品以及从哪些国家采购投入品。该模型产生了一种新的规模经济来源，其产生原因是企业承担了一个国家特定的固定成本，该成本允许其所有组装工厂从该国采购投入品。这种跨工厂的共享固定成本在企业组装地点和采购地点之间创造了相互依赖关系，并导致第三市场对双边贸易成本变化产生非单调反应。

30449.title: Information Frictions and Employee Sorting Between Startups
30449.zh_title: 信息摩擦与初创企业间的员工分类
30449.authors: Kevin A. Bryan, Mitchell Hoffman, Amir Sariri
30449.abstract: Would workers apply to better firms if they were more informed about firm quality? Collaborating with 26 science-based startups, we create a custom job board and invite business school alumni to apply. The job board randomizes across applicants to show coarse expert ratings of all startups’ science and/or business model quality. Making ratings visible strongly reallocates applications toward higher-rated firms. This reallocation holds restricting to high-quality workers. Treatments operate in part by shifting worker beliefs about firms’ right-tail outcomes. Despite these benefits, workers make post-treatment bets indicating highly overoptimistic beliefs about startup success, suggesting a problem of broader informational deficits.
30449.zh_abstract: 如果工人对企业的质量了解更多，他们会申请更好的企业吗？我们与26家科学型初创企业合作，创建了一个定制招聘板，并邀请商学院校友申请。该招聘板随机向申请者展示所有初创企业科学和/或商业模式质量的粗略专家评级。使评级可见会显著将申请重新分配给评级更高的企业。这种重新分配在仅限于高质量工人时仍然成立。这些处理措施部分通过改变工人对企业右尾结果的信念来发挥作用。尽管有这些好处，工人在处理后的赌注中表现出对初创企业成功的高度过度乐观信念，这表明存在更广泛的信息缺失问题。

30448.title: Auditing the Prescription Drug Consumer Price Index in a Changing Marketplace
30448.zh_title: 审计变化市场中的处方药消费者价格指数
30448.authors: Richard G. Frank, Andrew L. Hicks, Ernst R. Berndt
30448.abstract: The Bureau of Labor Statistics' Prescription Drug Consumer Price Index (CPI-Rx) has been the focus of considerable controversy in recent years. The CPI-Rx limits its sampling frame to transactions in retail outpatient outlets, and excludes prescription pharmaceuticals dispensed in hospitals, physician/clinic outpatient facilities, and nursing homes. Thus the CPI-Rx overlooks the increasingly important specialty pharmaceuticals dispensed in hospitals, outpatient clinics, and physician offices, whose transactions are instead captured in the overall hospital or professional services component of the medical CPI. Specialty drugs now account for 55% of all U.S. drug spending, double the amount of a decade earlier. To the extent specialty drug growth differs from that of traditional pharmaceuticals, the CPI-Rx could provide an inaccurate measure of overall drug price inflation. Using data from the IBM MarketScan database for the years 2010-2019 and IQVIA-designated specialty drugs, we estimate that by not sampling specialty drugs in non-retail settings, the CPI-Rx has understated overall U.S. prescription drug price inflation by just under 75 basis points annually. We discuss implications for health care policy, and suggest the BLS examine the feasibility of publishing an overall pharmaceutical price index incorporating both traditional and specialty pharmaceuticals dispensed in retail and non-retail settings.
30448.zh_abstract: 美国劳工统计局的处方药消费者价格指数（CPI-Rx）近年来一直是争议的焦点。CPI-Rx将其抽样范围限制在零售门诊药房的交易中，排除了在医院、医生/诊所门诊设施和疗养院发放的处方药。因此，CPI-Rx忽略了在医院、门诊诊所和医生办公室发放的日益重要的专科药物，这些交易反而被纳入医疗CPI的整体医院或专业服务部分。专科药物现在占美国所有药物支出的55%，是十年前的两倍。如果专科药物的增长与传统药物不同，CPI-Rx可能无法准确衡量整体药物价格通胀。利用2010-2019年IBM MarketScan数据库的数据和IQVIA指定的专科药物，我们估计，由于未对非零售环境中的专科药物进行抽样，CPI-Rx每年将美国整体处方药价格通胀低估了近75个基点。我们讨论了对医疗保健政策的影响，并建议劳工统计局研究发布一个包含零售和非零售环境中发放的传统和专科药物的整体药物价格指数的可行性。
30448.meta: Programs：EH, PR；JEL：C43, D43, I11, I18, L11, L53, L65

30447.title: Firm Responses and Wage Effects of Foreign Demand Shocks with Fixed Labor Costs and Monopsony
30447.zh_title: 固定劳动力成本和买方垄断下外国需求冲击的企业反应与工资效应
30447.authors: Emmanuel Dhyne, Ayumu Ken Kikkawa, Toshiaki Komatsu, Magne Mogstad, Felix Tintelnot
30447.abstract: We quantify the firm responses and real wage effects of foreign demand shocks. We use Belgian micro data to construct firm-specific measures of demand shocks which capture that firms pass on foreign demand shocks to domestic suppliers. Our estimates of firm responses to these shocks suggest that firms face upward-sloping labor supply curves and have sizable fixed labor costs. We specify a general equilibrium model with these features to quantify the aggregate effects of simulated tariff shocks on wages. We find that ignoring fixed labor costs substantially underestimates aggregate effects on wages, whereas incorporating upward-sloping labor supply appears less consequential.
30447.zh_abstract: 我们量化了外国需求冲击的企业反应和实际工资效应。我们使用比利时微观数据构建了企业特定的需求冲击度量，这些度量捕捉了企业将外国需求冲击传递给国内供应商的过程。我们对这些冲击的企业反应的估计表明，企业面临向上倾斜的劳动力供给曲线，并具有相当大的固定劳动力成本。我们指定了一个具有这些特征的一般均衡模型，以量化模拟关税冲击对工资的总体效应。我们发现，忽略固定劳动力成本会显著低估对工资的总体效应，而纳入向上倾斜的劳动力供给似乎影响较小。
30447.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, LS, PR；JEL：E1, F1, F12, J31, J42, L11

30446.title: Working from Home Around the World
30446.zh_title: 全球范围内的居家办公
30446.authors: Cevat Giray Aksoy, Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Mathias Dolls, Pablo Zarate
30446.abstract: The pandemic triggered a large, lasting shift to work from home (WFH). To study this shift, we survey full-time workers who finished primary school in 27 countries as of mid 2021 and early 2022. Our cross-country comparisons control for age, gender, education, and industry and treat the U.S. mean as the baseline. We find, first, that WFH averages 1.5 days per week in our sample, ranging widely across countries. Second, employers plan an average of 0.7 WFH days per week after the pandemic, but workers want 1.7 days. Third, employees value the option to WFH 2-3 days per week at 5 percent of pay, on average, with higher valuations for women, people with children and those with longer commutes. Fourth, most employees were favorably surprised by their WFH productivity during the pandemic. Fifth, looking across individuals, employer plans for WFH levels after the pandemic rise strongly with WFH productivity surprises during the pandemic. Sixth, looking across countries, planned WFH levels rise with the cumulative stringency of government-mandated lockdowns during the pandemic. We draw on these results to explain the big shift to WFH and to consider some implications for workers, organization, cities, and the pace of innovation.
30446.zh_abstract: 疫情引发了一次大规模且持久的向居家办公的转变。为了研究这一转变，我们在2021年年中和2022年年初对27个国家中完成小学教育的全职工作者进行了调查。我们的跨国比较控制了年龄、性别、教育和行业，并以美国均值作为基准。我们发现，首先，在我们的样本中，居家办公平均每周1.5天，各国之间差异很大。其次，雇主计划在疫情后平均每周居家办公0.7天，但员工希望每周1.7天。第三，员工平均将每周居家办公2-3天的选择权价值评估为薪酬的5%，其中女性、有孩子的人和通勤时间较长的人估值更高。第四，大多数员工对疫情期间居家办公的生产力感到惊喜。第五，从个体层面看，疫情后雇主对居家办公水平的计划与疫情期间居家办公生产力的惊喜程度呈强正相关。第六，从国家层面看，计划的居家办公水平与疫情期间政府强制封锁的累积严格程度呈正相关。我们利用这些结果来解释向居家办公的重大转变，并考虑其对员工、组织、城市和创新步伐的一些影响。

30445.title: Is Physical Climate Risk Priced? Evidence from Regional Variation in Exposure to Heat Stress
30445.zh_title: 物理气候风险是否被定价？来自热应激暴露区域差异的证据
30445.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Timothy Johnson, Suresh Sundaresan, Tuomas Tomunen
30445.abstract: We exploit regional variations in exposure to heat stress to study if physical climate risk is priced in municipal bond, corporate bond and equity markets. We find consistent evidence across asset classes that local exposure to heat stress is associated with higher yield spreads for bonds and higher conditional expected returns for stocks. These results are observed robustly starting in 2013–15. The fact that heat stress premium is (a) positive, (b) economically substantial, and (c) present across comprehensive samples of multiple asset classes is consistent with macroeconomic models where climate change has a direct negative impact on aggregate consumption.
30445.zh_abstract: 我们利用热应激暴露的区域差异来研究物理气候风险是否在市政债券、公司债券和股票市场中被定价。我们发现跨资产类别的一致证据表明，当地对热应激的暴露与债券较高的收益率利差和股票较高的条件预期收益相关。这些结果从2013-15年左右开始稳健地观察到。热应激溢价（a）为正，（b）在经济上显著，并且（c）存在于多个资产类别的全面样本中，这一事实与气候变化对总消费产生直接负面影响的宏观经济模型一致。

30444.title: Gender and Race in Entrepreneurial Finance
30444.zh_title: 创业融资中的性别与种族
30444.abstract: Economic frictions pervade the founding, financing, growing, and exiting of high-growth entrepreneurial firms. This article considers one friction that currently affects a small, but important, set of entrepreneurs: racial and gender discrimination. I first collect facts from a large empirical literature that show clear gender and race gaps in participation and financing of startups. Female founders manage 16-25% of all startups, while Black entrepreneurs rarely exceed 3% of the startup population. Conditioning on startups that successfully raise external finance has little impact on these gaps. The complexity of the entrepreneurial process presents several opportunities for discrimination to manifest itself and produce this gap. The article details the major discrimination theories and the empirical methods used to test for their presence. It then provides an extensive review of a growing empirical literature in entrepreneurial finance that tests these models. The pattern of evidence reveals a nuanced and incomplete story about bias, information asymmetry, and differential treatment of underrepresented founders. The article ends with an extensive set of research ideas motivated by the gaps in the entrepreneurship literature and recent developments in theory and measurement of discrimination.
30444.zh_abstract: 经济摩擦普遍存在于高增长创业企业的创立、融资、成长和退出过程中。本文考虑了一种目前影响一小部分但重要的创业者群体的摩擦：种族和性别歧视。我首先从大量实证文献中收集事实，这些事实显示在创业企业的参与和融资方面存在明显的性别和种族差距。女性创始人管理着16-25%的创业企业，而黑人创业者很少超过创业企业人口的3%。以成功获得外部融资的创业企业为条件，对这些差距几乎没有影响。创业过程的复杂性为歧视的表现和产生这种差距提供了多种机会。本文详细介绍了主要的歧视理论以及用于检验其存在的实证方法。然后，它对创业金融领域日益增长的、检验这些模型的实证文献进行了广泛回顾。证据模式揭示了一个关于偏见、信息不对称和对代表性不足的创始人的区别对待的微妙且不完整的故事。本文最后提出了一系列广泛的研究思路，这些思路源于创业文献中的空白以及歧视理论和测量方面的最新发展。

30443.title: Robustness Checks in Structural Analysis
30443.zh_title: 结构分析中的稳健性检验
30443.authors: Sylvain Catherine, Mehran Ebrahimian, Mohammad Fereydounian, David Sraer, David Thesmar
30443.abstract: This paper introduces a computationally efficient methodology for estimating variants of structural models. Our approach approximates the relationship between moments and parameters, offering a low-cost alternative to traditional estimation methods. We establish general convergence conditions, primarily requiring model-based moments to be continuous functions of parameters. While this continuity does not necessitate a continuous economic model, it does require the model to have only sparse discontinuities, a concept we define. We also provide convergence rate bounds for Kernel and Neural Net approximations, with the latter demonstrating superior performance in higher dimensions. \nWe apply this methodology to two standard structural models: (1) dynamic corporate finance and (2) life-cycle portfolio choice. We demonstrate the reliability of our approach through simulations and then use it to explore identification, robustness to sample splits and moment selection, and model misspecification. These explorations are computationally infeasible with standard techniques, but become trivial with our methodology.
30443.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了一种计算效率高的方法，用于估计结构模型的变体。我们的方法近似了矩与参数之间的关系，为传统估计方法提供了一种低成本替代方案。我们建立了通用的收敛条件，主要要求基于模型的矩是参数的连续函数。虽然这种连续性不需要连续的经济模型，但它要求模型只有稀疏的不连续性，这是我们定义的一个概念。我们还提供了核近似和神经网络近似的收敛速度界限，其中神经网络在高维情况下表现出更优的性能。我们将此方法应用于两个标准结构模型：（1）动态公司金融和（2）生命周期投资组合选择。我们通过模拟证明了我们方法的可靠性，然后利用它来探索识别、对样本分割和矩选择的稳健性以及模型误设。这些探索使用标准技术在计算上不可行，但使用我们的方法变得简单。

30442.title: The Midlife Crisis
30442.authors: Osea Giuntella, Sally McManus, Redzo Mujcic, Andrew J. Oswald, Nattavudh Powdthavee, Ahmed Tohamy
30442.abstract: This paper documents a longitudinal crisis of midlife among the inhabitants of rich nations. Yet middle-aged citizens in our data sets are close to their peak earnings, have typically experienced little or no illness, reside in some of the safest countries in the world, and live in the most prosperous era in human history. This is paradoxical and troubling. The finding is consistent, however, with the prediction – one little-known to economists – of Elliott Jaques (1965). Our analysis does not rest on elementary cross-sectional analysis. Instead the paper uses panel and through-time data on, in total, approximately 500,000 individuals. It checks that the key results are not due to cohort effects. Nor do we rely on simple life-satisfaction measures. The paper shows that there are approximately quadratic hill-shaped patterns in data on midlife suicide, sleeping problems, alcohol dependence, concentration difficulties, memory problems, intense job strain, disabling headaches, suicidal feelings, and extreme depression. We believe the seriousness of this societal problem has not been grasped by the affluent world’s policy-makers.
30442.zh_abstract: 本文记录了富裕国家居民中一种纵向的中年危机。然而，我们数据集中的中年公民接近其收入峰值，通常很少或没有经历过疾病，居住在一些世界上最安全的国家，并生活在人类历史上最繁荣的时代。这是矛盾且令人不安的。然而，这一发现与Elliott Jaques（1965）的预测——一个经济学家知之甚少的预测——是一致的。我们的分析并非基于简单的横截面分析。相反，本文使用了总计约50万人的面板数据和纵向数据。它检验了关键结果并非由队列效应导致。我们也不依赖简单的生活满意度指标。本文显示，在中年自杀、睡眠问题、酒精依赖、注意力困难、记忆问题、高强度工作压力、致残性头痛、自杀念头和极度抑郁的数据中，存在近似二次的驼峰形模式。我们认为，富裕世界的政策制定者尚未认识到这一社会问题的严重性。

30441.title: Power and Dignity in the Low-Wage Labor Market: Theory and Evidence from Wal-Mart Workers
30441.zh_title: 低工资劳动力市场中的权力与尊严：来自沃尔玛员工的理论与证据
30441.authors: Arindrajit Dube, Suresh Naidu, Adam D. Reich
30441.abstract: We measure workers’ preferences for wages and non-wage amenities at America’s largest employer, Walmart, using targeted survey experiments. We find that workers have an economically significant willingness to pay for “dignity at work". Consistent with the presence of monopsony power, we estimate hypothetical quit elasticities similar to recent estimates from the literature. We document significant complementarities between wages and non-wage amenities, suggesting that measures of monopsony that do not account for amenities may be biased. We find that workers at low dignity jobs have higher quit elasticities, but lower bargaining elasticities, relative to workers at high dignity jobs. Finally, we use cross-state variation in the bite of Walmart’s 2014 corporate minimum wage to estimate the effects of the minimum wage on both workplace dignity and other amenities. We find no evidence that non-wage amenities are reduced in response to a higher minimum wage, consistent with wage-amenity complementarity and labor market power.
30441.zh_abstract: 我们通过有针对性的调查实验，衡量了美国最大雇主沃尔玛员工对工资和非工资福利的偏好。我们发现，员工对“工作中的尊严”具有经济上显著的支付意愿。与买方垄断力量的存在一致，我们估计了与近期文献估计相似的情景离职弹性。我们记录了工资和非工资福利之间显著的互补性，这表明未考虑福利的买方垄断度量可能存在偏差。我们发现，与高尊严工作的员工相比，低尊严工作的员工具有更高的离职弹性，但更低的议价弹性。最后，我们利用沃尔玛2014年公司最低工资影响程度的跨州差异，来估计最低工资对工作尊严和其他福利的影响。我们没有发现证据表明非工资福利会因最低工资提高而减少，这与工资-福利互补性和劳动力市场力量一致。

30440.title: The Effects of Off-label Drug Use on Disability and Medical Expenditure
30440.zh_title: 标签外用药对残疾和医疗支出的影响
30440.authors: Katharina E. Blankart, Frank R. Lichtenberg
30440.abstract: Does using prescription drugs off-label increase disability and medical expenditure? This paper uses a unique dataset to evaluate off-label vs. on-label drug use in the US non-institutionalized population. Patients using drugs off-label have on average $\$515$ higher medical expenditure and work-loss cost. Pharmaceutical innovation has direct and indirect effects on off-label drug use. Market size is indicative of the fraction of treatments used off-label. Our findings have implications for regulation and welfare. We address endogeneity issues by demonstrating that patients with higher disease severity do not experience higher off-label uses and by controlling for unobserved individual and condition effects.
30440.zh_abstract: 使用标签外处方药是否会增加残疾和医疗支出？本文利用一个独特的数据集，评估了美国非住院人群中标签外用药与标签内用药的情况。平均而言，标签外用药患者的医疗支出和工作损失成本高出515美元。医药创新对标签外用药有直接和间接影响。市场规模反映了标签外用药治疗的比例。我们的发现对监管和福利具有启示意义。我们通过证明病情严重程度较高的患者并未经历更高的标签外用药率，并控制未观测到的个体和条件效应，来处理内生性问题。

30439.title: Exhaustive or Exhausting? Evidence on Respondent Fatigue in Long Surveys
30439.zh_title: 详尽还是令人疲惫？长调查中受访者疲劳的证据
30439.authors: Dahyeon Jeong, Shilpa Aggarwal, Jonathan Robinson, Naresh Kumar, Alan Spearot, David Sungho Park
30439.abstract: Living standards measurement surveys require sustained attention for several hours. We quantify survey fatigue by randomizing the order of questions in 2-3 hour-long in-person surveys. An additional hour of survey time increases the probability that a respondent skips a question by 10-64%. Because skips are more common, the total monetary value of aggregated categories such as assets or expenditures declines as the survey goes on, and this effect is sizeable for some categories: for example, an extra hour of survey time lowers food expenditures by 25%. We find similar effect sizes within phone surveys in which respondents were already familiar with questions, suggesting that cognitive burden may be a key driver of survey fatigue.
30439.zh_abstract: 生活水平测量调查需要持续数小时的注意力集中。我们通过随机化2-3小时面对面调查中问题的顺序来量化调查疲劳。每增加一小时的调查时间，受访者跳过问题的概率增加10-64%。由于跳答更为常见，资产或支出等汇总类别的总货币价值随着调查的进行而下降，且这种效应对某些类别影响显著：例如，额外一小时的调查时间使食品支出降低25%。我们在受访者已熟悉问题的电话调查中发现了类似的影响大小，这表明认知负担可能是调查疲劳的关键驱动因素。

30438.title: The Social Tax: Redistributive Pressure and Labor Supply
30438.zh_title: 社会税：再分配压力与劳动力供给
30438.authors: Eliana Carranza, Aletheia Donald, Florian Grosset, Supreet Kaur
30438.abstract: In low-income communities, pressure to share income with others may disincentivize work, distorting labor supply. We document that across countries, social groups that undertake more interpersonal transfers work fewer hours. Using a field experiment, we enable piece-rate factory workers in Côte d’Ivoire to shield income using blocked savings accounts over 3-9 months. Workers may only deposit earnings increases, relative to baseline, mitigating income effects on labor supply. We vary whether the offered account is private or known to the worker’s network, altering the likelihood of transfer requests against saved income. When accounts are private, take-up is substantively higher (60% vs. 14%). Offering private accounts sharply increases labor supply—raising work attendance by 10% and earnings by 11%. Outgoing transfers do not decline, indicating no loss in redistribution. Our estimates imply a 9-14% social tax rate. The welfare benefits of informal redistribution may come at a cost, depressing labor supply and productivity.
30438.zh_abstract: 在低收入社区，与他人分享收入的压力可能会抑制工作积极性，扭曲劳动力供给。我们记录到，跨国数据显示，进行更多人际转移的社会群体工作时间更少。通过一项实地实验，我们让科特迪瓦的计件工厂工人在3-9个月内使用封闭储蓄账户来保护收入。工人只能存入相对于基线的收入增长部分，以减轻收入对劳动力供给的影响。我们改变所提供的账户是私密的还是被工人社交网络知晓，从而改变针对储蓄收入提出转移请求的可能性。当账户私密时，接受率显著更高（60%对14%）。提供私密账户急剧增加了劳动力供给——使工作出勤率提高10%，收入提高11%。对外转移并未减少，表明再分配没有损失。我们的估计表明社会税率为9-14%。非正式再分配的福利收益可能以抑制劳动力供给和生产力为代价。
30438.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H0, J0, O1, O4, O55

30437.title: Facts and Fantasies about Wage Setting and Collective Bargaining
30437.zh_title: 关于工资设定和集体谈判的事实与幻想
30437.authors: Manudeep Bhuller, Karl O. Moene, Magne Mogstad, Ola L. Vestad
30437.abstract: In this article, we document and discuss salient features of collective bargaining systems in the OECD countries, with the goal of debunking some misconceptions and myths and revitalizing the general interest in wage setting and collective bargaining. We hope that such an interest may help close the gap between how economists tend to model wage setting and how wages are actually set. Canonical models of competitive labor markets, monopsony, and search and matching all assume a decentralized wage setting where individual firms and workers determine wages. In most advanced economies, however, it is common that firms or employer associations bargain with unions over wages, producing collective bargaining systems. We show that the characteristics of these systems vary in important ways across advanced economies, with regards to both the scope and the structure of collective bargaining.
30437.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们记录并讨论了经合组织国家集体谈判制度的显著特征，旨在破除一些误解和迷思，并重振对工资设定和集体谈判的普遍兴趣。我们希望这种兴趣有助于缩小经济学家倾向于建模工资设定的方式与实际工资设定方式之间的差距。竞争性劳动力市场、买方垄断以及搜索和匹配的经典模型都假设分散化的工资设定，即由单个企业和工人决定工资。然而，在大多数发达经济体中，企业或雇主协会与工会就工资进行谈判是常见的，从而形成了集体谈判制度。我们表明，这些制度的特征在发达经济体之间存在重要差异，无论是在集体谈判的范围还是结构方面。

30436.title: Health and Safety vs. Freedom of Contract: The Tortured Path of Wage and Hours Limits Through the State Legislatures and the Courts
30436.zh_title: 健康与安全对合同自由：通过州立法机构和法院的工资与工时限制的曲折道路
30436.abstract: The paper examines changes in wage and hour labor regulation between 1898 and 1938. Many see the 1905 Lochner Supreme Court decision striking down hours limits for men as the beginning of 30 years in which labor regulation was stymied by the doctrine of “freedom of contract.” That issue played a role but judges often weighed it against safety issues. As a result, hours limits for men in dangerous industries were found to be constitutional. The debates over minimum wages for women also centered on these issues. These laws passed muster in state supreme courts and initially at the U.S. Supreme Court. In 1923 a majority of Supreme Court judges emphasized freedom of contract in declaring a female minimum wage unconstitutional. Seeing close votes and substantial turnover of judges on the Supreme Court, many states continued promulgating advisory minimums and passed new laws. Ultimately, turnover on the Court and a renewed emphasis on the role of minimum wages in ensuring health and safety of women and children during the Depression led the Court to declare minimums for women constitutional. This opened the door for federal minimum wage legislation for all workers.
30436.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1898年至1938年间工资和工时劳动法规的变化。许多人将1905年最高法院在洛克纳案中推翻男性工时限制的裁决视为30年劳动法规被“合同自由”原则阻碍的开端。该问题确实发挥了作用，但法官们经常将其与安全问题权衡。因此，危险行业中男性的工时限制被裁定为合宪。关于女性最低工资的辩论也围绕这些问题展开。这些法律在州最高法院以及最初在美国最高法院获得了通过。1923年，最高法院多数法官强调合同自由，宣布女性最低工资违宪。鉴于最高法院的投票接近且法官更替频繁，许多州继续颁布建议性最低工资并制定新法律。最终，法院的人员更替以及大萧条期间对最低工资在确保妇女和儿童健康与安全方面作用的重新强调，导致法院宣布女性最低工资合宪。这为所有工人的联邦最低工资立法打开了大门。
30436.meta: Programs：DAE, LE, LS；JEL：J81, K31, N32, N42

30435.title: The Impacts of Covid-19 Illnesses on Workers
30435.zh_title: 新冠疾病对工人的影响
30435.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Evan J. Soltas
30435.abstract: We show that Covid-19 illnesses persistently reduce labor supply. Using an event study, we estimate that workers with week-long Covid-19 work absences are 7 percentage points less likely to be in the labor force one year later compared to otherwise-similar workers who do not miss a week of work for health reasons. Our estimates suggest Covid-19 illnesses have reduced the U.S. labor force by approximately 500,000 people (0.2 percent of adults) and imply an average forgone earnings per Covid-19 absence of at least $\$9,000,$ about 90 percent of which reflects lost labor supply beyond the initial absence week.
30435.zh_abstract: 我们表明，新冠疾病持续减少了劳动力供给。通过事件研究，我们估计，与因健康原因未缺勤一周的类似工人相比，因新冠缺勤一周的工人在一年后仍在劳动力市场中的可能性低7个百分点。我们的估计表明，新冠疾病已使美国劳动力减少约50万人（占成年人的0.2%），并意味着每次新冠缺勤的平均收入损失至少为9,000美元，其中约90%反映了初始缺勤周之后的劳动力供给损失。
30435.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, J17, J21, J22

30434.title: Bargaining in the Shadow of Uncertainty
30434.zh_title: 不确定性阴影下的谈判
30434.authors: Marina Agranov, Hülya Eraslan, Chloe Tergiman
30434.abstract: We experimentally study unanimity and majority voting rules in multilateral bargaining environments with stochastic future surplus. In these settings, reaching agreement when expected future surplus is sufficiently higher than the current surplus is inefficient. Theoretically, such inefficiencies never arise under unanimity rule but can arise under majority rule as players try to avoid endogenous risk of being excluded from the winning coalitions in the future. We find strong support for this prediction both when the unanimity rule is predicted to lead to more delays, and when both rules should lead to identical levels of delays. We also find that there are more delays than predicted under the majority rule. Using data from conversations among the bargainers and the type of proposals that are implemented, we find that these deviations arise as a result of more egalitarian sharing than predicted by theory, and therefore, lower risk of being excluded from the winning coalitions in the future.
30434.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究了多边谈判环境中具有随机未来剩余的一致同意和多数投票规则。在这些环境中，当预期未来剩余显著高于当前剩余时达成协议是低效的。理论上，这种低效在一致同意规则下永远不会出现，但在多数规则下可能出现，因为参与者试图避免未来被排除在获胜联盟之外的内生风险。我们发现，无论是在一致同意规则预计导致更多延迟的情况下，还是在两种规则应导致相同延迟水平的情况下，这一预测都得到了强有力的支持。我们还发现，在多数规则下，延迟比预测的更多。利用谈判者之间的对话数据以及所实施提案的类型，我们发现这些偏差是由于比理论预测更平等的分享而产生的，因此未来被排除在获胜联盟之外的风险更低。

30433.title: Multiple Price Lists for Willingness to Pay Elicitation
30433.zh_title: 用于支付意愿诱导的多价格列表
30433.authors: Kelsey Jack, Kathryn McDermott, Anja Sautmann
30433.abstract: Multiple price lists are a convenient tool to elicit willingness to pay (WTP) in surveys and experiments, but choice patterns such as “multiple switching” and “never switching” indicate high error rates. Existing measurement approaches often do not provide accurate standard errors and cannot correct for bias due to framing and order effects. We propose to combine a randomization approach with a random-effects latent utility model to detect bias and account for error. Data from a choice experiment in South Africa shows that significant order effects exist which, if uncorrected, would lead to distorted conclusions about subjects’ preferences. We provide templates to create a multiple price list survey instrument in SurveyCTO and analyze the resulting data using our proposed methods.
30433.zh_abstract: 多价格列表是在调查和实验中诱导支付意愿的便捷工具，但“多次切换”和“从不切换”等选择模式表明错误率很高。现有的测量方法通常不能提供准确的标准误，也无法纠正因框架效应和顺序效应导致的偏差。我们提出将随机化方法与随机效应潜在效用模型相结合，以检测偏差并解释误差。来自南非选择实验的数据表明，存在显著的顺序效应，如果不加以纠正，将导致关于受试者偏好的扭曲结论。我们提供了在SurveyCTO中创建多价格列表调查工具模板，并使用我们提出的方法分析所得数据。
