30433.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE；JEL：C91, C93, D46, O12, Q51

30432.title: Judicial Independence, Local Protectionism, and Economic Integration: Evidence from China
30432.zh_title: 司法独立、地方保护主义与经济一体化：来自中国的证据
30432.authors: Ernest Liu, Yi Lu, Wenwei Peng, Shaoda Wang
30432.abstract: We show that judicial independence can reduce local protectionism and foster cross-regional economic integration. We exploit a judicial independence reform in China with staggered roll-out since 2014. The reform removed local governments’ control over local courts’ financial and personnel decisions, thereby substantially improving local courts’ independence. Combining novel data on the universes of civil lawsuits and business registration records, we show that local defendants’ rate of winning court cases against non-local plaintiffs declined by 7.0% after the reform. The effect is mainly driven by improvements in the quality of judicial decisions and is more salient for politically connected local defendants. Over time, the reduction in local protectionism encouraged smaller non-local firms to file lawsuits against larger local firms. Using the shareholding network extracted from business registration records, we find that the decline in local protectionism could attract 8.4% more inward investment flows into reformed localities. This has the potential to increase China’s GDP by 2.3% when the judicial independence reform is implemented nationwide.
30432.zh_abstract: 我们证明司法独立可以减少地方保护主义并促进跨区域经济一体化。我们利用中国自2014年起分阶段推行的司法独立改革。该改革取消了地方政府对地方法院财政和人事决策的控制，从而大幅提升了地方法院的独立性。结合涵盖所有民事诉讼和商业登记记录的新数据，我们发现改革后，本地被告在针对非本地原告的诉讼中胜诉率下降了7.0%。这一效应主要由司法判决质量的提升驱动，且对具有政治关联的本地被告更为显著。随着时间的推移，地方保护主义的减少鼓励了更多小型非本地企业起诉大型本地企业。利用从商业登记记录中提取的股权网络，我们发现地方保护主义的下降能够吸引更多（8.4%）的资本流入改革地区。当司法独立改革在全国范围内实施时，这有可能使中国GDP增长2.3%。
30432.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LE, PE, POL, PR；JEL：K0, P48, R11

30431.title: International College Students' Impact on the US Skilled Labor Supply
30431.zh_title: 国际大学生对美国熟练劳动力供给的影响
30431.authors: Michel Beine, Giovanni Peri, Morgan Raux
30431.abstract: US universities have attracted hundreds of thousands of international students each year for the last decade. Some of these remain in the US after graduating and contribute to the high skilled labor supply in US labor markets. In this paper, we identify and estimate by how much one more international master’s (or bachelor’s) student increases the skilled labor supply of the US in the short-run. To estimate this "transition rate" we implement an instrumental variable estimation using quasi-random variation in the tuition charged to international students by public US universities in the year that they likely started their studies. We find that attracting an additional international student to a US university increases the local labor supply by about 0.23 employees for master’s students and about 0.11 for bachelor’s students. These averages conceal an important difference. While non-STEM bachelor’s and master’s students had negligible transition rates into US employment, STEM Master students have had significant transition rates around 0.2, especially after the 2008 reform of Optional Practical Training for STEM graduates.
30431.zh_abstract: 在过去十年中，美国大学每年吸引数十万国际学生。其中一些学生在毕业后留在美国，为美国劳动力市场的高技能劳动力供给做出贡献。在本文中，我们识别并估计了每增加一名国际硕士（或学士）学生在短期内对美国熟练劳动力供给的增加量。为了估计这一“转化率”，我们采用工具变量估计法，利用美国公立大学在可能入学年份对国际学生收取学费的准随机变化。我们发现，吸引一名额外的国际学生到美国大学，会使当地劳动力供给增加约0.23人（硕士生）和约0.11人（本科生）。这些平均值掩盖了一个重要差异。虽然非STEM（科学、技术、工程和数学）专业的本科生和硕士生进入美国就业的转化率可以忽略不计，但STEM硕士生的转化率显著，约为0.2，尤其是在2008年针对STEM毕业生的选择性实习培训改革之后。

30484.title: Is Social Protection a Luxury Good?
30484.authors: Michael Lokshin, Martin Ravallion, Iván Torre
30484.abstract: The claim that social protection is a luxury good—with a national income elasticity exceeding unity—has as been influential. The paper tests the “luxury good hypothesis” using newly-assembled data on social protection spending across countries since 1995, treating the pandemic period separately, as it entailed a large expansion in social protection efforts. While the mean income share devoted to social protection rises with income, this is attributable to multiple confounders, including relative prices, weak governance in low-income countries and access to information-communication technologies. Controlling for these, social protection is not a luxury good. This was also true during the pandemic.
30484.zh_abstract: 社会保护是奢侈品——其国民收入弹性超过1——这一论断颇具影响力。本文利用1995年以来各国社会保护支出的新汇编数据检验了“奢侈品假说”，并将疫情时期单独处理，因为该时期社会保护努力大幅扩张。虽然社会保护支出占国民收入的平均份额随收入增加而上升，但这可归因于多种混杂因素，包括相对价格、低收入国家治理薄弱以及信息通信技术的可及性。在控制这些因素后，社会保护并非奢侈品。在疫情期间也是如此。

30483.title: Understanding Labor Market Discrimination Against Transgender People: Evidence from a Double List Experiment and a Survey
30483.zh_title: 理解劳动力市场对跨性别者的歧视：来自双重列表实验和一项调查的证据
30483.authors: Billur Aksoy, Christopher S. Carpenter, Dario Sansone
30483.abstract: Using a US nationally representative sample and a double list experiment designed to elicit views free from social desirability bias, we find that anti-transgender labor market attitudes are significantly underreported. After correcting for this concealment, we report that 73 percent of people would be comfortable with a transgender manager and 74 percent support employment non-discrimination protection for transgender people. We also show that respondents severely underestimate the population level of support for transgender individuals in the workplace, and we find that labor market support for transgender people is significantly lower than support for gay, lesbian, and bisexual people. Our results provide timely evidence on workplace-related views toward transgender people and help us better understand employment discrimination against them.
30483.zh_abstract: 利用美国全国代表性样本和旨在引出不受社会期望偏差影响的观点的双重列表实验，我们发现反跨性别的劳动力市场态度被显著低报。在纠正这种隐瞒后，我们报告称73%的人对跨性别管理者感到舒适，74%的人支持针对跨性别者的就业非歧视保护。我们还表明，受访者严重低估了工作场所中对跨性别者支持的人口水平，并且我们发现对跨性别者的劳动力市场支持显著低于对男同性恋、女同性恋和双性恋者的支持。我们的结果为工作场所中与跨性别者相关的观点提供了及时的证据，并有助于我们更好地理解针对他们的就业歧视。

30482.title: The Human Perils of Scaling Smart Technologies: Evidence from Field Experiments
30482.zh_title: 智能技术规模化的人类风险：来自田野实验的证据
30482.authors: Alec Brandon, Christopher M. Clapp, John A. List, Robert D. Metcalfe, Michael Price
30482.abstract: Smart-home technologies have been heralded as an important way to increase energy conservation. While in vitro engineering estimates support optimism, little has been done to explore whether such estimates scale beyond the lab. We estimate the causal impact of smart thermostats on energy use via two novel framed field experiments in which a random subset of treated households have a smart thermostat installed in their home. Examining 18 months of associated high-frequency data on household energy consumption, yielding more than 16 million hourly electricity and daily natural gas observations, we find little evidence that smart thermostats have a statistically or economically significant effect on energy use. Using almost four million observations of system events including human interactions with their smart thermostat, we find that user behavior dampens energy savings and explains the discrepancy between estimates from engineering models, which assume a perfectly compliant subject, and actual households, who are occupied by users acting in accord with behavioral economists’ conjectures. In this manner, our data document a keen threat to the scalability of new user-based technologies.
30482.zh_abstract: 智能家居技术被誉为增加节能的重要途径。虽然体外工程估算支持乐观态度，但很少有研究探讨这些估算能否在实验室之外规模化。我们通过两项新颖的框架田野实验来估算智能恒温器对能源使用的因果影响，其中随机选取的部分处理组家庭在家中安装了智能恒温器。通过检查18个月相关的高频家庭能源消耗数据（产生超过1600万个每小时电力和每日天然气观测值），我们几乎没有发现智能恒温器对能源使用具有统计或经济上显著影响的证据。利用近400万个系统事件观测值（包括人类与其智能恒温器的互动），我们发现用户行为削弱了节能效果，并解释了工程模型（假设完全服从的受试者）与实际家庭（由按照行为经济学家猜想行事的用户占据）估算之间的差异。通过这种方式，我们的数据记录了基于用户的新技术可规模化性的一个显著威胁。

30481.title: College Consumption Amenities, Academic Performance, and Donation Behavior
30481.zh_title: 大学消费性设施、学业表现与捐赠行为
30481.authors: Joshua M. Hyman, Isaac McFarlin Jr.
30481.abstract: Colleges compete to attract students by investing in amenities such as athletics, dormitories, and student activities. We examine the effect of student consumption of postsecondary amenities on academic achievement and future donation behavior in the context of Big-Time college sports. We resolve the selection issue using data from a large, public university with a highly-ranked men’s basketball team, where student season tickets are awarded by lottery. Game attendance has small negative effects on academic performance but no impact on donation behavior. Negative academic effects are concentrated at the bottom of the achievement distribution and driven by in-state students and students attending during seasons when the team reaches the postseason tournament. We uncover no evidence of spillover effects to roommates. Our results suggest that certain postsecondary amenities may hinder academic performance, with little upside from future giving.
30481.zh_abstract: 大学通过投资于体育、宿舍和学生活动等设施来竞争吸引学生。我们以大型大学体育为背景，考察学生对高等教育设施消费对学业成绩和未来捐赠行为的影响。我们利用一所拥有高排名男子篮球队的大型公立大学的数据来解决选择问题，该校的学生季票通过抽签分配。观赛对学业成绩有微小的负面影响，但对捐赠行为没有影响。负面的学业影响集中在成绩分布底部的学生，并且主要由本州学生以及在该队进入季后赛赛季期间观赛的学生驱动。我们没有发现对室友的溢出效应。我们的结果表明，某些高等教育设施可能会阻碍学业表现，而未来捐赠的收益甚微。

30480.title: Perceptions about Monetary Policy
30480.authors: Michael D. Bauer, Carolin Pflueger, Adi Sunderam
30480.abstract: We estimate perceptions about the Fed's monetary policy rule from micro data on professional forecasters. The perceived rule varies significantly over time, with important consequences for monetary policy and bond markets. Over the monetary policy cycle, easings are perceived to be quick and surprising, while tightenings are perceived to be gradual and data-dependent. Consistent with the idea that forecasters learn about the policy rule from policy decisions, the perceived monetary policy rule responds to high-frequency monetary policy surprises. Variation in the perceived rule impacts financial markets, explaining changes in the sensitivity of interest rates to macroeconomic announcements and affecting risk premia on long-term Treasury bonds. It also helps explain forecast errors for the future federal funds rate. We interpret these findings through the lens of a model with forecaster heterogeneity and learning from observed policy decisions.
30480.zh_abstract: 我们利用专业预测者的微观数据来估算对美联储货币政策规则的认知。感知到的规则随时间显著变化，对货币政策和债券市场产生重要影响。在货币政策周期中，宽松政策被认为迅速且出人意料，而紧缩政策则被认为渐进且依赖数据。与预测者从政策决策中学习政策规则的观点一致，感知到的货币政策规则会对高频货币政策意外做出反应。感知规则的变化会影响金融市场，解释了利率对宏观经济公告敏感性的变化，并影响长期国债的风险溢价。它还有助于解释未来联邦基金利率的预测误差。我们通过一个包含预测者异质性和从观察到的政策决策中学习的模型来解读这些发现。
30480.meta: Programs：AP, ME；JEL：E03, E4, E42, E44, G12

30479.title: Tail Risk in Production Networks
30479.zh_title: 生产网络中的尾部风险
30479.abstract: This paper describes the response of the economy to large shocks in a nonlinear production network. While arbitrary combinations of shocks can be studied, it focuses on a sector's tail centrality, which quantifies the effect of a large negative shock to the sector – a measure of the systemic risk of each sector. Tail centrality is theoretically and empirically very different from local centrality measures such as sales share – in a benchmark case, it is measured as a sector's average downstream closeness to final production. The paper then uses the results to analyze the determinants of total tail risk in the economy. Increases in interconnectedness in the presence of complementarity can simultaneously reduce the sensitivity of the economy to small shocks while increasing the sensitivity to large shocks. Tail risk is strongest in economies that display conditional granularity, where some sectors become highly influential following negative shocks.
30479.zh_abstract: 本文描述了在非线性生产网络中经济对大规模冲击的反应。虽然可以研究任意冲击组合，但本文聚焦于一个部门的尾部中心度，该指标量化了该部门遭受大规模负面冲击的影响——即每个部门的系统性风险度量。尾部中心度在理论和实证上都与销售份额等局部中心度指标截然不同——在基准情形下，它被衡量为一个部门到最终生产的平均下游接近度。然后，本文利用这些结果分析经济中总尾部风险的决定因素。在存在互补性的情况下，互联性的增强可以同时降低经济对小冲击的敏感性，同时增加对大冲击的敏感性。尾部风险在表现出条件粒度性的经济体中最为强烈，在这些经济体中，一些部门在遭受负面冲击后会变得极具影响力。
30479.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME, PR；JEL：D24, D57, E13, E32

30478.title: Real-Time Forward-Looking Skewness over the Business Cycle
30478.zh_title: 经济周期中的实时前瞻性偏度
30478.abstract: This paper measures option-implied skewness for individual firms and the overall stock market between 1980 and 2021, giving real-time measures of conditional micro and macro skewness. There are three key results: 1. Micro skewness is significantly procyclical, while macro skewness is acyclical; 2. Micro skewness leads the business cycle and is strongly linked to credit spreads, suggesting one potential causal channel; 3. Micro skewness is significantly, and not mechanically, correlated with macro volatility, implying that there is a common shock driving them both, which is also linked to the business cycle.
30478.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了1980年至2021年间单个公司和整个股票市场的期权隐含偏度，提供了条件性微观和宏观偏度的实时度量。有三个关键结果：1. 微观偏度显著顺周期，而宏观偏度是非周期的；2. 微观偏度领先于经济周期，并与信用利差密切相关，暗示了一个潜在的因果渠道；3. 微观偏度与宏观波动率显著相关，且并非机械相关，这意味着存在一个共同冲击驱动两者，该冲击也与经济周期相关。
30478.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, E22, E27, E3, G13

30477.title: Effect of Macroprudential Policies on Sovereign Bond Markets: Evidence from the ASEAN-4 Countries
30477.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策对主权债券市场的影响：来自东盟四国的证据
30477.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Gazi Salah. Uddin, Tianqi Luo, Ranadeva Jayasekera, Donghyun Park
30477.abstract: This paper examines whether prudential policies help to reduce sovereign bond vulnerability to global spillover risk in ASEAN-4 countries (Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, and Thailand). We measure sovereign vulnerability within a risk connectedness network among sovereign bonds. The direct effect is that markets with tighter prudential policies have significantly smaller spillovers from the Treasury yield shocks of other regional and global economies. The sum of indirect and direct effects indicates that prudential policies reduce sovereign spillover risk in the long term. These findings suggest prudential policies have dual efficiency in sovereign risk regulation and Treasury internationalization.
30477.zh_abstract: 本文考察了审慎政策是否有助于降低东盟四国（印度尼西亚、马来西亚、菲律宾和泰国）主权债券对全球溢出风险的脆弱性。我们在主权债券之间的风险关联网络中衡量主权脆弱性。直接影响是，审慎政策更严格的市场，其国债收益率受到其他区域和全球经济体冲击的溢出效应显著更小。间接和直接效应的总和表明，审慎政策在长期内降低了主权溢出风险。这些发现表明，审慎政策在主权风险监管和国债国际化方面具有双重效率。

30476.title: Dollar Reserves and U.S. Yields: Identifying the Price Impact of Official Flows
30476.zh_title: 美元储备与美国收益率：识别官方流动的价格影响
30476.abstract: This paper shows that the price impact of foreign official (FO) purchases or sales of U.S. Treasuries (USTs) is about twice as large as previously reported in the literature once critical sources of endogeneity are addressed. We also show that prevailing estimates of this price impact suffer from omitted variable bias when foreign government bond yields and Federal Reserve policies are not controlled for. By exploiting changes in the volatility of FO flows and U.S. yields after the 2008 Global Financial Crisis, we identify a FO flow shock via heteroskedasticity in a structural VAR. We estimate that a $\$100$B flow shock moves the 5-year, 10-year, and 30-year yields by more than 100 basis points on impact, compared to the 19-44 basis points range that we estimate by assuming FO flows are price inelastic and without controlling for foreign yields and Fed actions. Our findings suggest that FO sales of USTs played a critical role during the March 2020 episode of Treasury market turmoil and that even a small reduction in the Dollar's share of China's reserves could have a significant impact on U.S. long-term interest rates.
30476.zh_abstract: 本文表明，一旦解决了关键的内生性来源，外国官方购买或出售美国国债的价格影响大约是文献先前报告的两倍。我们还表明，当未控制外国政府债券收益率和美联储政策时，这种价格影响的普遍估计存在遗漏变量偏差。通过利用2008年全球金融危机后外国官方流动和美国收益率波动性的变化，我们利用结构向量自回归中的异方差性识别出一个外国官方流动冲击。我们估计，一个1000亿美元的流动冲击会使5年期、10年期和30年期收益率在冲击发生时变动超过100个基点，而我们假设外国官方流动价格无弹性且未控制外国收益率和美联储行动时估计的范围为19-44个基点。我们的发现表明，在2020年3月国债市场动荡期间，外国官方出售美国国债发挥了关键作用，并且即使美元在中国储备中的份额小幅减少，也可能对美国长期利率产生显著影响。
30476.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E4, F2, F30, G1

30475.title: Long-Run Trends in Long-Maturity Real Rates 1311-2021
30475.zh_title: 长期限实际利率的长期趋势：1311-2021年
30475.authors: Kenneth S. Rogoff, Barbara Rossi, Paul Schmelzing
30475.abstract: Taking advantage of key recent advances in long-run financial and economic data, this paper analyzes the statistical properties of global long-maturity real interest rates over the past seven centuries. In contrast to existing consensus, which has overwhelmingly concentrated on short samples for short-maturity rates, we find that long-maturity real interest rates across advanced economies are in fact trend stationary, and exhibit a persistent downward trend since the Renaissance. We investigate structural breaks in real interest rates over time using multiple statistical approaches, and find that only the Black Death and the "Trinity default" of 1557 appear as consistent inflection points in capital markets on both global and country levels. While a 1914 break is also suggested in multiple series (though less robust than existing literature would lead one to expect), the evidence for an inflection point in 1981 appears much weaker. We further examine trends in persistence, as well as commonly-invoked drivers of global real rates: exploiting significant data advances, we argue that historically, demographic and productivity factors appear to show no promising causal role, and in fact diverge from real interest rates over the long run.
30475.zh_abstract: 利用近期在长期金融和经济数据方面的关键进展，本文分析了过去七个世纪全球长期限实际利率的统计特性。与现有共识（主要集中于短期利率的短样本）相反，我们发现发达经济体的长期限实际利率实际上是趋势平稳的，并且自文艺复兴以来呈现出持续的下行趋势。我们使用多种统计方法研究了实际利率随时间变化的结构性断裂，发现只有黑死病和1557年的“三位一体违约”在全球和国家层面的资本市场中表现为一致的拐点。虽然多个序列也提示了1914年的断裂（尽管不如现有文献所预期的那么稳健），但1981年存在拐点的证据则弱得多。我们进一步考察了持续性的趋势，以及通常被引用的全球实际利率驱动因素：利用显著的数据进展，我们认为从历史上看，人口和生产力因素似乎没有显示出有希望的因果作用，并且实际上在长期内与实际利率背道而驰。

30474.title: Fertility and the Education of African Parents and Children
30474.zh_title: 生育率与非洲父母及子女的教育
30474.abstract: Sub-Saharan Africa exhibits higher fertility and lower education than other world regions. Economic and demographic theory posit that these phenomena are linked, with slow fertility decline connected to slow education growth among both adults and children. Using microdata from 33 African countries, this paper documents the co-evolution of adult education, fertility, and child education in female birth cohorts surrounding the onset of the region's fertility transition. Fertility change displays a robust negative relationship with the educational outcomes of adult women but a more nuanced relationship with the educational outcomes of children. As fertility declines, children's grade attainment rises, but their school enrollment does not. The divergence is partly explained by a split in how women's education relates to fertility and child education. Rising women's education predicts declining fertility and rising children's grade attainment, but it is less systematically linked to enrollment change.
30474.zh_abstract: 撒哈拉以南非洲地区的生育率高于世界其他地区，而教育水平则较低。经济和人口理论认为这些现象是相互关联的，生育率下降缓慢与成人和儿童的教育增长缓慢有关。利用33个非洲国家的微观数据，本文记录了在该地区生育率转变开始前后的女性出生队列中，成人教育、生育率和儿童教育的共同演变。生育率变化与成年女性的教育成果呈现稳健的负相关关系，但与儿童的教育成果关系更为微妙。随着生育率下降，儿童的年级完成率上升，但他们的入学率并未上升。这种分化部分可以通过女性教育与生育率及儿童教育之间关系的差异来解释。女性教育的提高预示着生育率下降和儿童年级完成率上升，但与入学率变化的系统性关联较弱。

30473.title: Exposure to Past Immigration Waves and Attitudes toward Newcomers
30473.zh_title: 过去移民浪潮的暴露程度与对新来者的态度
30473.authors: Rania Gihleb, Osea Giuntella, Luca Stella
30473.abstract: How does previous exposure to massive immigrant inflows affect concerns about current immigration and the integration of refugees? To answer this question, we investigate attitudes toward newcomers among natives and previous immigrants. In areas that in the 1990s received higher inflows of immigrants of German origin—so-called ethnic Germans—native Germans are more likely to believe that refugees are a resource for the economy and the culture, viewing them as an opportunity rather than a risk. Refugees living in these areas report better health and feel less exposed to xenophobia.
30473.zh_abstract: 先前大规模移民流入的经历如何影响对当前移民和难民融入的担忧？为了回答这个问题，我们调查了本地人和先前移民对新来者的态度。在1990年代接收了更多德裔移民（即所谓的“民族德意志人”）流入的地区，德国本地人更倾向于认为难民是经济和文化的资源，将其视为机遇而非风险。居住在这些地区的难民报告了更好的健康状况，并感觉较少受到仇外心理的影响。

30472.title: Quantifying and Explaining the Decline in Public-School Teacher Retirement Benefits
30472.zh_title: 量化并解释公立学校教师退休福利的下降
30472.authors: Nino Abashidze, Robert L. Clark, Lee A. Craig
30472.abstract: In recent decades, many states have reduced future retirement benefits for newly hired teachers. We estimate that in 2020 the average initial monthly retirement benefit, for teachers retiring with 30 years of service, is 11.2 percent lower than that of teachers retiring in the same plan with the provisions that were in place in 2000, implying a lower annual benefit of over $\$3,000$. We examine why state plans that cover only teachers, along with plans in which teachers are not included in Social Security, have made smaller reductions in the generosity of their pension benefits in recent decades.
30472.zh_abstract: 近几十年来，许多州降低了新入职教师的未来退休福利。我们估计，到2020年，对于服务满30年退休的教师，其平均初始月度退休福利比2000年同一计划下退休的教师低11.2%，这意味着年福利减少超过3000美元。我们研究了为何仅覆盖教师的州计划，以及教师未被纳入社会保障的计划，在近几十年对其养老金福利的慷慨程度做出了较小的削减。
30472.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H55, J26, J32, J45, N31

30471.title: What Drives Risky Prescription Opioid Use? Evidence from Migration
30471.zh_title: 什么驱动了危险的处方阿片类药物使用？来自移民的证据
30471.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Matthew Gentzkow, Dean Li, Heidi L. Williams
30471.abstract: We investigate the role of person- and place-specific factors in the opioid epidemic by developing and estimating a dynamic model of risky prescription opioid use. We estimate the model using the relationship between cross-state migration and risky use among adults receiving federal disability insurance from 2006 to 2015. Event studies suggest that moving to a state with a 3.5 percentage point higher rate of risky use (roughly the difference between the 20th and 80th percentile states) increases the probability of risky use by 1.0 percentage point on-impact, followed by an additional increase of 0.30 percentage points per subsequent year. Model estimates imply large place effects in both the likelihood of transitioning to addiction and the availability of prescription opioids. A one standard deviation reduction in all place effects would have reduced risky use by two-thirds over our study period. Reductions in place effects on addiction have a larger cumulative effect than analogous reductions in place effects on availability. However, their relative efficacy is reversed in the first few years, suggesting a temporal tradeoff among policy options.
30471.zh_abstract: 我们通过开发并估计一个危险处方阿片类药物使用的动态模型，研究了个体因素和地点因素在阿片类药物流行中的作用。我们利用2006年至2015年间联邦残疾保险成年受益人的跨州迁移与危险使用之间的关系来估计该模型。事件研究表明，迁移到一个危险使用率高出3.5个百分点（大致相当于第20百分位州与第80百分位州之间的差异）的州，会立即将危险使用的概率提高1.0个百分点，随后每年再增加0.30个百分点。模型估计表明，地点因素在成瘾转变的可能性和处方阿片类药物的可获得性方面都有很大影响。所有地点因素减少一个标准差，将在我们的研究期间内将危险使用减少三分之二。减少成瘾方面的地点因素比减少可获得性方面的地点因素具有更大的累积效应。然而，在最初几年，它们的相对有效性是相反的，这表明政策选择之间存在时间上的权衡。

30470.title: Do the Retired Elderly in Europe Decumulate Their Wealth? The Importance of Bequest Motives, Precautionary Saving, Public Pensions, and Homeownership
30470.zh_title: 欧洲退休老年人会减少财富吗？遗赠动机、预防性储蓄、公共养老金和住房所有权的重要性
30470.abstract: In this paper, we use micro data on a large number of European countries from the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE) to examine the wealth accumulation (saving) behavior of the retired elderly in Europe. To summarize our main findings, we find that less than half of the retired elderly in Europe are decumulating their wealth and that the average wealth accumulation rate of the retired elderly in Europe is positive though relatively moderate (6.6% over a 3-year period). These findings strongly suggest that the Wealth Decumulation (or Retirement Saving) Puzzle (the tendency of the retired elderly to not decumulate their wealth or to decumulate their wealth more slowly than expected) applies in the case of Europe. Moreover, our regression results suggest that bequest motives, generous public pension systems, and the reluctance of retired elderly homeowners to sell or borrow against their owner-occupied housing are the primary explanations for the existence of the Wealth Decumulation Puzzle in Europe.
30470.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们使用来自欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）的多个欧洲国家的微观数据，考察欧洲退休老年人的财富积累（储蓄）行为。总结我们的主要发现，我们发现不到一半的欧洲退休老年人正在减少他们的财富，并且欧洲退休老年人的平均财富减少率虽然相对温和（三年期内为6.6%），但为正值。这些发现强烈表明，财富减少（或退休储蓄）之谜（退休老年人倾向于不减少财富或比预期更慢地减少财富）适用于欧洲的情况。此外，我们的回归结果表明，遗赠动机、慷慨的公共养老金体系以及退休老年房主不愿出售或以其自住住房为抵押借款，是欧洲存在财富减少之谜的主要原因。
30470.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, D15, D64, E21, H55, J14

30469.title: Choosing Who Chooses: Selection-Driven Targeting in Energy Rebate Programs
30469.zh_title: 选择谁选择：能源回扣项目中的选择驱动型目标定位
30469.authors: Takanori Ida, Takunori Ishihara, Koichiro Ito, Daido Kido, Toru Kitagawa, Shosei Sakaguchi, Shusaku Sasaki
30469.abstract: We develop an optimal policy assignment rule that integrates two distinctive approaches commonly used in economics—targeting by observables and targeting through self-selection. Our method can be used with experimental or quasi-experimental data to identify who should be treated, be untreated, and self-select to achieve a policymaker’s objective. Applying this method to a randomized controlled trial on a residential energy rebate program, we find that targeting that optimally exploits both observable data and self-selection outperforms conventional targeting. We use the Local Average Treatment Effect (LATE) framework (Imbens and Angrist, 1994) to investigate the mechanism in our approach. By estimating several key LATEs based on the random variation created by our experiment, we demonstrate how our method allows policymakers to identify whose self-selection would be valuable and harmful to social welfare.
30469.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个最优政策分配规则，该规则整合了经济学中常用的两种不同方法——基于可观测特征的目标定位和通过自我选择的目标定位。我们的方法可以利用实验或准实验数据，来确定谁应该被处理、谁不应该被处理以及谁应该自我选择，以实现政策制定者的目标。将此方法应用于一项关于住宅能源回扣项目的随机对照试验，我们发现，最优地利用可观测数据和自我选择的目标定位优于传统目标定位。我们使用局部平均处理效应（LATE）框架（Imbens和Angrist, 1994）来研究我们方法中的机制。通过基于实验产生的随机变异估计几个关键的LATE，我们展示了我们的方法如何使政策制定者能够识别哪些人的自我选择对社会福利有益，哪些人的自我选择有害。
30469.meta: Programs：EEE, IO, PE；JEL：C01, Q4, Q48, Q5, Q58

30468.title: Expectations and the Neutrality of Interest Rates
30468.abstract: Our central banks set interest rates, and do not even pretend to control money supplies. How do interest rates affect inflation? We finally have a complete theory of inflation under interest rate targets and unconstrained liquidity. Its long-run properties mirror those of monetary theory: Inflation can be stable and determinate under interest rate targets, including a peg, analogous to a k-percent rule. The zero bound era is confirmatory evidence. Uncomfortably, stability means that higher interest rates eventually raise inflation, just as higher money growth eventually raises inflation. Sticky prices generate some short-run non-neutrality as well: Higher nominal interest rates can raise real rates and lower output. A model in which higher nominal interest rates temporarily lower inflation, without a change in fiscal policy, is a harder task. I exhibit one such model, but it paints a much more limited picture than standard beliefs. We either need a model with a stronger effect, or to accept that higher interest rates have limited power to lower inflation. Empirical understanding of how interest rates affect inflation without fiscal help is also a wide-open question.
30468.zh_abstract: 我们的中央银行设定利率，甚至不假装控制货币供应量。利率如何影响通货膨胀？我们终于有了一个关于利率目标和不受限制的流动性下通货膨胀的完整理论。其长期特性反映了货币理论的特性：在利率目标（包括钉住利率）下，通货膨胀可以是稳定和确定的，类似于k%规则。零利率下限时代是确证性证据。令人不安的是，稳定性意味着更高的利率最终会提高通货膨胀，就像更高的货币增长最终会提高通货膨胀一样。价格粘性也产生了一些短期非中性：更高的名义利率可以提高实际利率并降低产出。一个模型，其中更高的名义利率暂时降低通货膨胀，而不改变财政政策，是一项更艰巨的任务。我展示了一个这样的模型，但它描绘的画面比标准信念要有限得多。我们要么需要一个具有更强效应的模型，要么接受更高的利率在降低通货膨胀方面的能力有限。在没有财政帮助的情况下，利率如何影响通货膨胀的实证理解也是一个悬而未决的问题。

30467.title: Energy Efficiency Can Deliver for Climate Policy: Evidence from Machine Learning-Based Targeting
30467.zh_title: 能源效率可以为气候政策带来成效：来自基于机器学习的定位的证据
30467.authors: Peter Christensen, Paul Francisco, Erica Myers, Hansen Shao, Mateus Souza
30467.abstract: Building energy efficiency has been a cornerstone of greenhouse gas mitigation strategies for decades. However, impact evaluations have revealed that energy savings typically fall short of engineering model forecasts that currently guide funding decisions. This creates a resource allocation problem that impedes progress on climate change. Using data from the largest U.S. energy efficiency program, we demonstrate that a data-driven approach to predicting retrofit impacts based on previously realized outcomes is more accurate than the status quo engineering models. Targeting high-return interventions based on these predictions dramatically increases net social benefits, from $\$0.93$ to $\$1.23$ per dollar invested.
30467.zh_abstract: 几十年来，建筑能效一直是温室气体减排战略的基石。然而，影响评估显示，能源节约通常低于目前指导资金决策的工程模型预测。这造成了资源配置问题，阻碍了气候变化的进展。利用美国最大能源效率项目的数据，我们证明，基于先前实现的结果来预测改造影响的数驱动方法比现状工程模型更准确。基于这些预测来定位高回报干预措施，将净社会效益从每投资1美元获得0.93美元大幅提高到1.23美元。

30466.title: Advances in the Economic Theory of Cultural Transmission
30466.zh_title: 文化传播经济理论的进展
30466.abstract: In this paper we survey recent advances in the economic theory of cultural transmission. We highlight three main themes on which the literature has made great progress in the last ten years: the domain of traits subject to cultural transmission, the micro-foundations for the technology of transmission, and feedback effects between culture, institutions, and various socio-economic environments. We conclude suggesting interesting areas for future research.
30466.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们综述了文化传播经济理论的最新进展。我们强调了该文献在过去十年中取得巨大进展的三个主要主题：受文化传播影响的特质领域、传播技术的微观基础，以及文化、制度和各种社会经济环境之间的反馈效应。最后，我们提出了未来研究的有趣领域。

30465.title: Housing Wealth and Online Consumer Behavior: Evidence from Xiong'an New Area in China
30465.zh_title: 住房财富与在线消费者行为：来自中国雄安新区的证据
30465.authors: Hanming Fang, Long Wang, Yang Yang
30465.abstract: We provide new evidence on the causal effects of housing wealth on consumer behavior. To overcome the empirical challenge of non-random housing wealth changes, we exploit the unexpected announcement of China's newest national-level new area—Xiong'an New Area—on April 1, 2017 as an exogenous shock to housing prices. We use a proprietary dataset of individual-level online consumption from the largest e-commerce company in China to measure various aspects of consumer behavior, such as consumption patterns, purchase hesitation, tolerance to unsatisfied products, and shirking (proxied by making online purchases during work hours). We explore the underlying mechanisms through which the housing shock affects consumer behavior; in particular, we attempt to disentangle the realizable and unrealizable housing wealth effects.
30465.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于住房财富对消费者行为因果效应的新证据。为了克服住房财富变化非随机的实证挑战，我们利用2017年4月1日中国最新国家级新区——雄安新区的意外宣布作为房价的外生冲击。我们使用来自中国最大电子商务公司的个人层面在线消费专有数据集，来衡量消费者行为的各个方面，例如消费模式、购买犹豫、对不满意产品的容忍度以及怠工（以工作时间进行在线购物作为代理）。我们探讨了住房冲击影响消费者行为的潜在机制；特别是，我们试图区分可实现的住房财富效应和不可实现的住房财富效应。

30464.title: Do Low-skilled Immigrants Improve Native Productivity but Worsen Local Amenities? Learning from the South Korean Experience
30464.zh_title: 低技能移民是否提升了本地生产率但恶化了本地便利设施？来自韩国的经验
30464.authors: Hyejin Kim, Jongkwan Lee, Giovanni Peri
30464.abstract: In this study, we first evaluate the effect of a significant increase in low-skilled immigration in Korean municipalities from 2010-2015 on the internal migration of natives. Using Korean survey data we are able to distinguish between natives moving for work-related and non-work-related reasons. Using a change in immigration policy and the pre-existing networks of immigrants to construct an instrument for immigration across Korean municipalities, we find that locations experiencing significant low-skilled immigration attracted natives who moved for working purposes. However, these locations saw outflows of natives that moved for non-work-related reasons, such as due to housing and local amenities. We then estimate that immigration had positive effects on local firm creation and on native wages but reduced the quality of local amenities. It had small to no impact on local housing prices. These facts together suggest that immigration attracted natives who value labor income over local amenities but pushed out those who place a higher value on local amenities. Thus, immigration, while generating little net native migration, changed the composition of natives in Korean municipalities.
30464.zh_abstract: 在本研究中，我们首先评估了2010-2015年韩国各城市低技能移民显著增加对本地居民内部迁移的影响。利用韩国调查数据，我们能够区分因工作相关和非工作相关原因迁移的本地居民。通过利用移民政策变化和移民的既有网络构建韩国各城市移民的工具变量，我们发现经历显著低技能移民流入的地区吸引了因工作目的迁移的本地居民。然而，这些地区也出现了因非工作相关原因（如住房和本地便利设施）而迁出的本地居民。随后，我们估计移民对本地企业创建和本地工资产生了积极影响，但降低了本地便利设施的质量。移民对本地房价影响很小甚至没有影响。这些事实共同表明，移民吸引了重视劳动收入超过本地便利设施的本地居民，但挤出了那些更看重本地便利设施的人。因此，移民虽然几乎没有导致本地居民净迁移，但改变了韩国各城市本地居民的构成。
30464.meta: Programs：ITI, LS, PE；JEL：J21, J61, R12, R31

30463.title: The Rise of Age-Friendly Jobs
30463.zh_title: 适龄友好型工作的兴起
30463.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Nicolaj Søndergaard Mühlbach, Andrew J. Scott
30463.abstract: In 1990, one in five U.S. workers were aged over 50 years whereas today it is one in three. One possible explanation for this is that occupations have become more accommodating to the preferences of older workers. We explore this by constructing an “age-friendliness” index for occupations. We use Natural Language Processing to measure the degree of overlap between textual descriptions of occupations and characteristics which define age friendliness. Our index provides an approximation to rankings produced by survey participants and has predictive power for the occupational share of older workers. We find that between 1990 and 2020 around three quarters of occupations have seen their age-friendliness increase and employment in above-average age-friendly occupations has risen by 49 million. However, older workers have not benefited disproportionately from this rise, with substantial gains going to younger females and college graduates and with male non-college educated workers losing out the most. These findings point to the need to frame the rise of age-friendly jobs in the context of other labour market trends and imperfections. Purely age-based policies are insufficient given both heterogeneity amongst older workers as well as similarities between groups of older and younger workers. The latter is especially apparent in the overlapping appeal of specific occupational characteristics.
30463.zh_abstract: 1990年，美国五分之一的工人年龄超过50岁，而如今这一比例是三分之一。一个可能的解释是，职业已变得更加适应老年工人的偏好。我们通过构建职业的“适龄友好度”指数来探索这一点。我们使用自然语言处理来衡量职业文本描述与定义适龄友好度的特征之间的重叠程度。我们的指数近似于调查参与者产生的排名，并对老年工人的职业份额具有预测能力。我们发现，在1990年至2020年间，大约四分之三的职业的适龄友好度有所提高，且高于平均适龄友好度职业的就业人数增加了4900万。然而，老年工人并未从这一增长中不成比例地受益，年轻女性和大学毕业生获得了显著收益，而男性非大学教育工人损失最大。这些发现表明，需要将适龄友好型工作的兴起置于其他劳动力市场趋势和不完善的背景下。鉴于老年工人之间的异质性以及老年和年轻工人群体之间的相似性，纯粹基于年龄的政策是不够的。后者在特定职业特征的共同吸引力中尤为明显。

30462.title: Transportation Networks, Short-term Mobility, and Pollution Exposure: Evidence from High-Speed Rail in China
30462.zh_title: 交通网络、短期流动性与污染暴露：来自中国高铁的证据
30462.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Dave Donaldson, Shanjun Li, Yatang Lin, Deyu Rao
30462.abstract: Can the enhanced mobility created by transportation infrastructure investments help people to avoid environmental extremes? We use transaction records from China’s card payment system to measure experienced pollution exposure (EPE)—that is, exposure based on the pollution levels at travelers’ actual locations—and evaluate how EPE was affected by the country’s high-speed railway network, even while holding pollution itself constant. Our estimates imply a reduction in EPE that corresponds to a mortality benefit of 21.3 million life-years saved, primarily due to travelers changing their destinations towards locations with predictably cleaner air.
30462.zh_abstract: 交通基础设施投资带来的增强流动性能否帮助人们避免环境极端情况？我们利用中国卡支付系统的交易记录来衡量经历过的污染暴露（EPE）——即基于旅行者实际所在地污染水平的暴露——并评估在污染本身保持不变的情况下，EPE如何受到国家高铁网络的影响。我们的估计表明，EPE的减少相当于挽救了2130万生命年的死亡效益，这主要是由于旅行者将目的地转向了空气质量可预测地更清洁的地点。

30461.title: Partial Identification of Personalized Treatment Response with Trial-reported Analyses of Binary Subgroups
30461.zh_title: 基于试验报告的二值亚组分析对个性化治疗反应的部分识别
30461.authors: Sheyu Li, Valentyn Litvin, Charles F. Manski
30461.abstract: Medical journals have adhered to a reporting practice that seriously limits the usefulness of published trial findings. Medical decision makers commonly observe many patient covariates and seek to use this information to personalize treatment choices. Yet standard summaries of trial findings only partition subjects into broad subgroups, typically into binary categories. Given this reporting practice, we study the problem of inference on long mean treatment outcomes E[y(t)|x], where t is a treatment, y(t) is a treatment outcome, and the covariate vector x has length K, each component being a binary variable. The available data are estimates of {E[y(t)|xk = 0], E[y(t)|xk = 1], P(xk)}, k = 1, . . . , K reported in journal articles. We show that reported trial findings partially identify {E[y(t)|x], P(x)}. Illustrative computations demonstrate that the summaries of trial findings in journal articles may imply only wide bounds on long mean outcomes. One can realistically tighten inferences if one can combine reported trial findings with credible assumptions having identifying power, such as bounded-variation assumptions.
30461.zh_abstract: 医学期刊一直遵循一种严重限制已发表试验结果有用性的报告实践。医疗决策者通常观察到许多患者协变量，并寻求利用这些信息来个性化治疗选择。然而，试验结果的标准摘要仅将受试者划分为宽泛的亚组，通常为二值类别。鉴于这种报告实践，我们研究了对长期平均治疗结果E[y(t)|x]的推断问题，其中t是治疗，y(t)是治疗结果，协变量向量x长度为K，每个分量都是二值变量。可用数据是期刊文章中报告的{E[y(t)|xk = 0], E[y(t)|xk = 1], P(xk)}的估计值，k = 1, . . . , K。我们表明，报告的试验结果部分识别了{E[y(t)|x], P(x)}。说明性计算表明，期刊文章中试验结果的摘要可能仅意味着长期平均结果的宽泛界限。如果可以将报告的试验结果与具有识别力的可信假设（如有界变异假设）相结合，则可以现实地收紧推断。

30460.title: Explanations for the Decline in Spending at Older Ages
30460.authors: Susann Rohwedder, Michael D. Hurd, Péter Hudomiet
30460.abstract: We use new data from the 2019 wave of the Consumption and Activities Mail Survey to help interpret the observed decline in spending as individuals age. At one extreme, forward-looking individuals optimally chose the decline; at the other, myopic individuals overspent and were forced to reduce spending because they had run out of wealth. Which interpretation is correct has important implications for the measurement of economic preparation for retirement. According to their own assessments, the fraction of respondents feeling financially constrained is lower at advanced ages, and the fraction satisfied with their economic situation is considerably higher at older ages than at ages near retirement. An important mechanism reconciling the evidence of reduced spending and greater economic satisfaction at older ages may be that individuals’ enjoyment of several activities declines with worsening health, widowing, and increasing age, leading to a lessening desire to spend on them. We find strong support for this hypothesis. Nonetheless, close to 20% of those older than 80 report not being satisfied with their financial situation, pointing to heterogeneity in economic security.
30460.zh_abstract: 我们利用2019年消费与活动邮件调查的新数据来帮助解释观察到的随年龄增长支出下降的现象。在一个极端，前瞻性个体最优地选择了这种下降；在另一个极端，短视个体过度支出并因财富耗尽而被迫减少支出。哪种解释正确对衡量退休经济准备具有重要意义。根据受访者自己的评估，感到财务受限的比例在高龄阶段较低，而对经济状况满意的比例在老年阶段远高于接近退休年龄。调和老年支出减少与经济满意度提高证据的一个重要机制可能是，随着健康状况恶化、丧偶和年龄增长，个体对若干活动的享受程度下降，导致在这些活动上消费的意愿减弱。我们找到了支持这一假设的有力证据。尽管如此，近20%的80岁以上老年人报告对其财务状况不满意，这表明经济保障存在异质性。

30459.title: A Framework for Economic Growth with Capital-Embodied Technical Change
30459.zh_title: 资本体现型技术变革的经济增长框架
30459.abstract: Technological advance is often embodied in capital inputs. This paper develops a model where capital innovations occur on two margins: (1) vertically, where a capital input becomes more productive at a given task; and (2) horizontally, where a capital input replaces labor at a given task. These two forms of technological advance engage in a macroeconomic “tug of war” when capital and labor have less than a unitary elasticity of substitution, and the resulting framework can meet numerous macroeconomic regularities. First, it can produce a balanced growth path and satisfy the Uzawa Growth Theorem—even though all technological progress occurs in capital inputs. Second, it can produce intuitive macroeconomic dynamics, adding perspectives on the apparent productivity slowdown and declining labor share of income. Third, it can produce rich industry dynamics and inform structural change, including declining GDP shares of agriculture and manufacturing, sectoral bottlenecks, the role of general purpose technologies, and the limited macroeconomic impacts of computing. Overall, this tractable framework can help resolve puzzling tensions between micro-level observations of technological advance and macroeconomic features of economic growth.
30459.zh_abstract: 技术进步通常体现在资本投入中。本文发展了一个模型，其中资本创新发生在两个边际上：（1）垂直方向，即资本投入在给定任务中变得更具生产力；（2）水平方向，即资本投入在给定任务中替代劳动力。当资本和劳动的替代弹性小于单位弹性时，这两种技术进步形式在宏观经济中展开“拉锯战”，由此产生的框架可以满足众多宏观经济规律。首先，它可以产生平衡增长路径并满足宇泽增长定理——尽管所有技术进步都发生在资本投入中。其次，它可以产生直观的宏观经济动态，为明显的生产率放缓和劳动收入份额下降增添视角。第三，它可以产生丰富的产业动态并为结构变革提供信息，包括农业和制造业GDP份额下降、部门瓶颈、通用技术的作用以及计算技术有限的宏观经济影响。总体而言，这个易于处理的框架有助于解决微观层面技术进步观察与宏观经济经济增长特征之间令人困惑的紧张关系。

30458.title: Monetary Policy and the Short-Rate Disconnect in Emerging Economies
30458.zh_title: 新兴经济体的货币政策与短期利率脱节
30458.authors: Pierre De Leo, Gita Gopinath, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan
30458.abstract: We document that emerging market central banks adhere to Taylor-type rules and lower their policy rates when economic activity slows down, including as a response to U.S. monetary policy tightening. This suggests a countercyclical monetary policy stance. However, in contrast to advanced economies, short-term market rates do not move in tandem with policy rates. Market rates, if anything, tend to increase during recessions. We present evidence that this disconnect between policy rates and market rates can be significantly explained by fluctuations in dollar funding premia that get transmitted into local market rates through the banking sector that relies on foreign funding. Our findings shed light on the challenges to transmission and effectiveness of monetary policy in emerging economies.
30458.zh_abstract: 我们记录了新兴市场央行遵循泰勒型规则，并在经济活动放缓时降低政策利率，包括作为对美国货币政策收紧的回应。这表明了一种逆周期的货币政策立场。然而，与发达经济体相反，短期市场利率并不与政策利率同步变动。市场利率在衰退期间反而倾向于上升。我们提供的证据表明，政策利率与市场利率之间的这种脱节可以显著由美元融资溢价的波动来解释，这些波动通过依赖外国融资的银行部门传导至本地市场利率。我们的发现揭示了新兴经济体货币政策传导和有效性的挑战。

30457.title: A Model of the Gold Standard
30457.abstract: The gold standard emerged as the international monetary system by the end of the 19th century. We formally study its properties in a micro-founded model and find that the scarcity of the world gold stock not only results in a suboptimal output of goods that are purchased with money but also subjects the domestic economy of a country to external shocks. The creation of inside money in the form of private credit instruments adds to the money supply, usually resulting in a Pareto improvement, but opens the door to the international transmission of banking crises. These properties of the gold standard can explain the limited adherence by peripheral countries because of the potential risks to their economies. We argue that the gold standard can be sustainable at the core but not at the periphery.
30457.zh_abstract: 金本位在19世纪末成为国际货币体系。我们在一个微观基础模型中正式研究其性质，发现世界黄金存量的稀缺性不仅导致用货币购买的商品产出次优，而且使一国国内经济受到外部冲击。以私人信用工具形式创造内部货币增加了货币供应量，通常导致帕累托改进，但为银行危机的国际传导打开了大门。金本位的这些性质可以解释外围国家因潜在经济风险而有限参与的原因。我们认为，金本位在核心国家可以持续，但在外围国家则不能。

30456.title: Racial and Ethnic Disparities in Retirement Outcomes: Impacts of Outreach
30456.zh_title: 退休结果中的种族与民族差异：外展服务的影响
30456.authors: Angelino Viceisza, Amaia Calhoun, Gabriella J.O. Lee
30456.abstract: We review select literature on racial and ethnic disparities in retirement outcomes in the United States and the impact of outreach on such outcomes. First, there are significant disparities in retirement outcomes, reflecting a long history of racism and structural barriers. Second, there is comparatively little work on the differential impact of retirement outreach across race and ethnicity. Future work should consider designing interventions that cater to the needs of specific demographic groups, for example, by embracing the fact that Blacks, Hispanics, and Whites acquire retirement information from different sources. Future work should incorporate behavioral insights, particularly from prior interventions, and innovate on methodologies for data collection, linking, and analysis.
30456.zh_abstract: 我们回顾了关于美国退休结果中种族与民族差异以及外展服务对这些结果影响的精选文献。首先，退休结果存在显著差异，这反映了长期的种族主义和结构性障碍。其次，关于退休外展服务在不同种族和民族群体中差异化影响的研究相对较少。未来的研究应考虑设计针对特定人口群体需求的干预措施，例如，认识到黑人、西班牙裔和白人从不同来源获取退休信息这一事实。未来的研究应纳入行为洞察，特别是来自先前干预措施的洞察，并在数据收集、链接和分析方法上进行创新。
30456.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：D83, J15, J26, J32, Z13

30455.title: Looking Backward, Innovating Forward: A Theory of Competitive Cascades
30455.zh_title: 回顾过去，创新未来：竞争级联理论
30455.authors: Kevin Lim, Daniel Trefler, Miaojie Yu
30455.abstract: Innovation depends on exporting and, in particular, on scale and competition in export markets. We develop a theory featuring (1) quality-segmented markets, (2) step-by-step innovation that moves firms forward along the quality ladder, and (3) escape-the-competition motives for innovation. We derive four predictions about the impact on innovation of scale and competition: a firm with a large and less-competitive quality segment ahead or forward of it will have strong incentives to innovate into this profitable segment, while a firm with a small and more-competitive quality segment behind it will also have strong incentives to innovate for fear of facing firms in this segment in the future. We take these predictions to Chinese firm-level data during a period of explosive export growth (2000-2006). Using information about scale and competition by quality segment in China's export markets, we confirm all four hypotheses. By implication, and unlike in standard CES models, the impact of trade on innovation depends critically on how it drives scale and competition in high- versus low-quality segments.
30455.zh_abstract: 创新依赖于出口，特别是依赖于出口市场的规模和竞争。我们发展了一个理论，该理论包含：(1) 质量分割的市场，(2) 逐步创新，推动企业沿着质量阶梯前进，以及 (3) 逃避竞争的创新动机。我们推导出关于规模和竞争对创新影响的四个预测：一个在其前方或前方拥有较大且竞争较少质量段的企业，将有强烈的创新动机进入这个有利可图的质量段；而一个在其后方拥有较小且竞争更激烈质量段的企业，也将有强烈的创新动机，因为担心未来会面对该质量段的企业。我们将这些预测应用于中国企业在出口爆炸性增长时期（2000-2006年）的企业层面数据。利用中国出口市场中按质量段划分的规模和竞争信息，我们确认了所有四个假设。这意味着，与标准CES模型不同，贸易对创新的影响关键取决于它如何推动高质量段与低质量段中的规模和竞争。
30455.meta: Programs：IO, ITI, PR；JEL：F01, F12, F14, O3

30499.title: Family Bargaining with Altruism
30499.zh_title: 具有利他主义的家庭谈判
30499.abstract: The theoretical literature on bargaining ignores altruism and assumes that everyone is an egoist. Because the importance of altruism in the family is widely recognized, the egoism assumption is especially problematic in the economics of the family. This paper shows that incorporating altruism into cooperative bargaining models shrinks the set potential cooperative bargaining solutions. The analysis depends on the implications of altruism for Pareto efficiency and the implications of Pareto efficiency for potential cooperative bargaining solutions. The analysis here applies not only to Nash bargaining but to all cooperative bargaining models. For noncooperative bargaining, the analysis implies that any solution that lies outside the shrunken set of potential cooperative bargaining solutions is not Pareto efficient.
30499.zh_abstract: 关于谈判的理论文献忽略了利他主义，并假设每个人都是利己主义者。由于利他主义在家庭中的重要性被广泛认可，利己主义假设在家庭经济学中尤其成问题。本文表明，将利他主义纳入合作谈判模型会缩小潜在合作谈判解决方案的集合。该分析取决于利他主义对帕累托效率的影响以及帕累托效率对潜在合作谈判解决方案的影响。这里的分析不仅适用于纳什谈判，而且适用于所有合作谈判模型。对于非合作谈判，该分析意味着任何位于缩小后的潜在合作谈判解决方案集合之外的解决方案都不是帕累托有效的。

30498.title: Demand Stimulus as Social Policy
30498.zh_title: 作为社会政策的需求刺激
30498.authors: Alan J. Auerbach, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Daniel Murphy
30498.abstract: We exploit a panel of city-level data with rich demographic information to estimate the distributional effects of Department of Defense spending and its effects on a range of social outcomes. The income generated by defense spending accrues predominantly to households without a bachelor’s degree. These households as well as Black households tend to disproportionately benefit from this spending. Defense spending also promotes a range of beneficial social outcomes that are often targeted by government programs, including reductions in poverty, divorce rates, disability rates, and mortality rates, as well as increases in homeownership, health insurance rates, and occupational prestige. We compare the effects of defense spending with the effects of general demand shocks and explore reasons for the differential effects of the shocks.
30498.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含丰富人口统计信息的城市级数据面板，来估计国防部支出的分配效应及其对一系列社会结果的影响。国防支出产生的收入主要归属于没有学士学位的家庭。这些家庭以及黑人家庭往往不成比例地从这项支出中受益。国防支出还促进了一系列有益的社会结果，这些结果通常是政府项目的目标，包括减少贫困、离婚率、残疾率和死亡率，以及提高住房拥有率、医疗保险覆盖率和职业声望。我们将国防支出的影响与一般需求冲击的影响进行了比较，并探讨了这些冲击产生不同效应的原因。

30497.title: Trade-ins and Transaction Costs in the Market for Used Business Jets
30497.zh_title: 二手公务机市场中的以旧换新与交易成本
30497.abstract: Manufacturers of durable goods can encourage consumers facing transaction costs to upgrade by accepting used units as trade-ins. These “buyback schemes” increase demand for new units, but increase the supply of used units if trade-ins are resold. In this paper, I investigate the equilibrium effects of buyback schemes in the market for business jets. I find that buyback increases demand for new units by 37% at fixed prices. However, in equilibrium this increase in sales is diminished by 38% due to substitution away from new jets among first time buyers. Because of this cannibalization, offering buyback is a dominant strategy for only 3 of the 6 major firms, with 3 firms offering buyback as a best response to other firms’ policies. I show that equilibrium buyback policies can change under counterfactual market structures: a simulated merger leads to a reduction in consumer welfare, 70% of which is due to a change in buyback policy.
30497.zh_abstract: 耐用品制造商可以通过接受旧单位作为以旧换新，来鼓励面临交易成本的消费者进行升级。这些“回购计划”增加了对新单位的需求，但如果以旧换新的产品被转售，则会增加旧单位的供应。在本文中，我研究了公务机市场中回购计划的均衡效应。我发现，在固定价格下，回购使对新单位的需求增加了37%。然而，在均衡状态下，由于首次购买者对新飞机的替代，这种销售增长被削弱了38%。由于这种蚕食效应，提供回购仅在6家主要公司中的3家是占优策略，而另外3家公司则将提供回购作为对其他公司政策的最佳回应。我表明，在反事实的市场结构下，均衡回购政策可能会发生变化：模拟的合并导致消费者福利减少，其中70%是由于回购政策的变化。

30496.title: Sparse Production Networks
30496.abstract: Firm-to-firm connections in domestic and international production networks play a fundamental role in economic outcomes. Firm heterogeneity and the sparse nature of firm-to-firm connections implicitly discipline network structure. We find that a large group of well-established statistical relationships are not useful in improving our understanding of production networks. We propose an ``elementary" model for production networks based on random matching and firm heterogeneity and characterize the families of statistics and data generating processes that may raise underidentification concerns in more complex models. The elementary model is a useful benchmark in developing ``instructive" statistics and informing model construction and selection.
30496.zh_abstract: 国内和国际生产网络中企业间的联系在经济结果中发挥着基础性作用。企业异质性和企业间联系的稀疏性隐含地约束了网络结构。我们发现，大量已确立的统计关系无助于增进我们对生产网络的理解。我们提出了一个基于随机匹配和企业异质性的生产网络“基础”模型，并刻画了在更复杂模型中可能引发欠识别问题的统计量族和数据生成过程。该基础模型是开发“指导性”统计量以及指导模型构建与选择的有用基准。

30495.title: Land Rental Markets: Experimental Evidence from Kenya
30495.zh_title: 土地租赁市场：来自肯尼亚的实验证据
30495.authors: Michelle Acampora, Lorenzo Casaburi, Jack Willis
30495.abstract: Do land market frictions cause misallocation in agriculture? In a field experiment in Western Kenya, we randomly subsidize owners to rent out land. Transferring cultivation rights to renters increases output and value added on the plots, consistent with imperfect land markets and misallocation, and induced rentals persist after the subsidy ends. Additional analysis provides insights on the magnitude and nature of land frictions—which include search, risks, and learning—and on the sources of gains from trade—which include differences between owners and renters in crop choices, productivity, and financial market constraints, but not in labor constraints.
30495.zh_abstract: 土地市场摩擦是否导致农业中的资源错配？在肯尼亚西部的一项实地实验中，我们随机补贴土地所有者以出租土地。将耕作权转移给租户增加了地块的产出和增加值，这与不完全土地市场和资源错配相一致，并且补贴结束后诱导的租赁行为得以持续。进一步分析提供了关于土地摩擦（包括搜索、风险和学习）的规模和性质，以及贸易收益来源（包括所有者和租户在作物选择、生产率和金融市场约束方面的差异，但不包括劳动力约束）的见解。
30495.meta: Programs：DEV, PR；JEL：C93, O11, O12, O13, Q15

30494.title: Multinationals and Structural Transformation
30494.authors: Vanessa I. Alviarez, Cheng Chen, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar, Liliana Varela, Kei-Mu Yi, Hongyong Zhang
30494.abstract: We study how multinational corporations (MNCs) shape firm-level and aggregate structural transformation. Using confidential microdata from Japan and exploiting a quasi-exogenous reform that expanded foreign investment opportunities in China, we assess empirically how this reform affected employment at firms in both the host country (China) and the home country (Japan). In liberalized industries, Japanese manufacturing affiliates in China expanded employment, while parent firms in Japan shifted out of manufacturing and into higher-value service activities, including R&D. To assess the broader relevance of this mechanism, we use microdata from several advanced and middle-income economies, and show that MNCs account for the majority of the middle-income countries’ reallocation to manufacturing.
30494.zh_abstract: 我们研究跨国公司如何塑造企业层面和总体的结构转型。利用日本的机密微观数据，并利用一项准外生改革（该改革扩大了中国的外商投资机会），我们实证评估了这项改革如何影响东道国（中国）和母国（日本）企业的就业。在自由化的行业中，日本在华制造业子公司扩大了就业，而日本母公司将就业从制造业转向了更高价值的服务活动，包括研发。为了评估这一机制的更广泛相关性，我们使用了多个发达和中等收入经济体的微观数据，并表明跨国公司是中等收入国家向制造业重新配置的主要推动力。

30493.title: Estimating Perceptions of the Relative COVID Risk of Different Social-Distancing Behaviors from Respondents' Pairwise Assessments
30493.zh_title: 从受访者的成对评估中估计对不同社交距离行为的相对新冠风险的认知
30493.abstract: How do people compare bundles of social-distancing behaviors? During the COVID pandemic, we showed 676 online respondents in the US, UK, and Israel 30 pairs of brief videos of acquaintances meeting. We asked them to indicate which in each pair depicted greater risk of COVID infection. Their choices imply that on average respondents considered talking 14 minutes longer to be as risky as standing 1 foot closer, being indoors as standing 3 feet closer, and removing a properly worn mask by either party as standing 4–5 feet closer. We explore subpopulations and perceived nonlinear and interacted effects of combined behaviors.
30493.zh_abstract: 人们如何比较不同的社交距离行为组合？在新冠疫情期间，我们向美国、英国和以色列的676名在线受访者展示了30对熟人见面的短视频。我们要求他们指出每对视频中哪一个显示的新冠感染风险更高。他们的选择表明，平均而言，受访者认为多交谈14分钟的风险与站近1英尺相当，在室内与站近3英尺相当，任何一方摘下正确佩戴的口罩与站近4-5英尺相当。我们探讨了亚群体以及组合行为的感知非线性和交互效应。

30492.title: Labor Supply and Occupational Choice
30492.zh_title: 劳动力供给与职业选择
30492.authors: Andrés Erosa, Luisa Fuster, Gueorgui Kambourov, Richard Rogerson
30492.abstract: We document a robust negative relationship between mean annual hours in an occupation and the dispersion of annual hours within that occupation. We study a unified model of occupational choice and labor supply that features heterogeneity across occupations in the return to working additional hours and show that it can match the key features of the data both qualitatively and quantitatively. Occupational choice in our model is shaped both by selection on comparative advantage and selection on tastes for leisure. Our quantitative work finds that the dominant source of differences in hours across occupations is selection on tastes for leisure.
30492.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一个稳健的负相关关系：职业的平均年工作小时数与该职业内年工作小时数的离散度之间。我们研究了一个统一的职业选择和劳动力供给模型，该模型具有不同职业在额外工作小时回报上的异质性，并表明该模型在定性和定量上都能匹配数据的关键特征。在我们的模型中，职业选择既受比较优势选择的影响，也受休闲偏好选择的影响。我们的定量研究发现，不同职业间工作小时差异的主要来源是休闲偏好的选择。

30491.title: Rising Markups or Changing Technology?
30491.zh_title: 上升的加成率还是变化的技术？
30491.authors: Lucia S. Foster, John C. Haltiwanger, Cody Tuttle
30491.abstract: Recent evidence suggests the U.S. business environment is changing, with rising market concentration and markups. The most prominent and extensive evidence backs out firm-level markups from the first-order conditions for variable factors. The markup is identified as the ratio of the variable factor’s output elasticity to its cost share of revenue. Our analysis starts from this indirect approach, but we exploit a long panel of manufacturing establishments to permit output elasticities to vary to a much greater extent - relative to the existing literature - across establishments within the same industry over time. With our more detailed estimates of output elasticities, the measured increase in markups is substantially dampened, if not eliminated, for U.S. manufacturing. As supporting evidence, we relate differences in the markups’ patterns to observable changes in technology (e.g., computer investment per worker, capital intensity, diversification to non-manufacturing) and find patterns in support of changing technology as the driver of those differences.
30491.zh_abstract: 近期证据表明美国商业环境正在变化，市场集中度和加成率上升。最突出且广泛的证据是从可变要素的一阶条件中反推出企业层面的加成率。加成率被识别为可变要素的产出弹性与其收入成本份额之比。我们的分析始于这种间接方法，但我们利用一个长期的制造业企业面板数据，允许产出弹性在相同行业内不同企业之间随时间有更大程度的变化——相对于现有文献。利用我们更详细的产出弹性估计，美国制造业中测得的加成率上升被大幅削弱，甚至消除。作为支持性证据，我们将加成率模式的差异与可观测的技术变化（例如，人均计算机投资、资本密集度、向非制造业的多元化）联系起来，并发现支持技术变化是这些差异驱动因素的模式。

30490.title: The Racial Wealth Gap, Financial Aid, and College Access
30490.zh_title: 种族财富差距、经济援助与大学入学机会
30490.abstract: We examine how the racial wealth gap interacts with financial aid in American higher education to generate a disparate impact on college access and outcomes. Retirement savings and home equity are excluded from the formula used to estimate the amount a family can afford to pay. All else equal, omitting those assets mechanically increases the financial aid available to families that hold them. White families are more likely to own those assets and in larger amounts. We document this issue and explore its relationship with observed differences in college attendance, types of institutions attended, degrees attained, and education debt using data from the Survey of Consumer Finances (SCF), the National Postsecondary Student Aid Study (NPSAS), and the Panel Study of Income Dynamics (PSID). We show that this treatment of assets provides an implicit subsidy worth thousands of dollars annually to students from families with above-median incomes. White students receive larger subsidies relative to Black students and Hispanic students with similar family incomes, and this gap in subsidies is associated with disadvantages in educational advancement and student loan levels. It may explain 10 percent to 15 percent of white students’ advantage in these outcomes relative to Black students and Hispanic students.
30490.zh_abstract: 我们研究了种族财富差距如何与美国高等教育中的经济援助相互作用，从而对大学入学机会和结果产生差异性影响。用于估算家庭支付能力的公式排除了退休储蓄和房屋净值。在其他条件相同的情况下，省略这些资产会机械地增加持有这些资产的家庭可获得的经济援助。白人家庭更有可能拥有这些资产，且持有量更大。我们利用消费者金融调查、全国中学后学生援助研究和收入动态面板研究的数据，记录了这一问题，并探讨了其与观察到的大学入学率、就读院校类型、获得学位和教育债务差异的关系。我们表明，这种对资产的处理方式为来自收入高于中位数家庭的学生提供了每年价值数千美元的隐性补贴。与具有相似家庭收入的黑人学生和西班牙裔学生相比，白人学生获得了更大的补贴，这种补贴差距与教育进步和学生贷款水平方面的劣势相关。这可能解释了白人学生相对于黑人学生和西班牙裔学生在这些结果上10%至15%的优势。
30490.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：D31, G51, I22, I24, J15

30489.title: Spatial Structural Change
30489.abstract: We develop a quantitative theory of spatial structural change in which economic growth, sectoral reallocation, and regional development are jointly determined in equilibrium. We show that sectoral reallocation inherently disadvantages regions specialized in the declining sector. Yet spatial forces—such as technology diffusion, trade, and migration—can offset or even reverse this bias. These forces are crucial to understand the first structural transformation of the US. Between 1880 and 1920, GDP per capita doubled and the agricultural employment share fell from 50% to 25%. Yet wages rose fastest in agriculture-intensive regions. Calibrated to this period, our model shows that productivity catch-up through technology diffusion enabled rural America to benefit from structural change; in its absence, rural regions would not have stagnated—they would have fallen further behind.
30489.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个空间结构变迁的定量理论，其中经济增长、部门再配置和区域发展在均衡中共同决定。我们表明，部门再配置内在地使专门从事衰退部门的区域处于不利地位。然而，空间力量——如技术扩散、贸易和移民——可以抵消甚至逆转这种偏差。这些力量对于理解美国的第一次结构转型至关重要。在1880年至1920年间，人均GDP翻了一番，农业就业份额从50%下降到25%。然而，工资在农业密集型地区增长最快。根据这一时期进行校准，我们的模型表明，通过技术扩散实现的生产率追赶使美国农村地区能够从结构变迁中受益；如果没有这种追赶，农村地区不会停滞不前——它们会进一步落后。

30488.title: Rebel Governance and Development: The Persistent Effects of Guerrillas in El Salvador
30488.zh_title: 反叛治理与发展：萨尔瓦多游击队的持久影响
30488.authors: Antonella Bandiera, Lelys I. Dinarte Diaz, Juan Miguel Jimenez, Sandra V. Rozo, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
30488.abstract: How does rebel governance affect long-term development? Rebel forces have controlled territory and imposed their own institutions in many countries over the past decades affecting millions of people. We investigate the economic, social, and political consequences of temporary territorial control by guerrillas during the Salvadoran Civil War. During that time, guerrillas displaced state authorities and created informal institutions that encouraged autonomy and self-sufficiency. Using a spatial regression discontinuity design, we show that areas once under guerrilla control have experienced worse economic outcomes over the last 20 years than adjacent areas controlled by the state. In these areas, higher social capital coexists with negative economic consequences. The fact that rebel institutions developed as an alternative to the state generated mistrust of outsiders, and isolated these areas from the rest of the country, resulting in over-dependence on subsistence farming and disengagement from postwar governments. Results are larger in areas where rebel governance initiatives were stronger and do not revert despite increased postwar public investment in formerly guerrilla areas. This study shows that when non-state actors develop alternative governance institutions, these can prompt adverse development effects through lasting norms of distrust of out-groups.
30488.zh_abstract: 反叛治理如何影响长期发展？过去几十年中，反叛力量在许多国家控制了领土并建立了自己的制度，影响了数百万民众。我们研究了萨尔瓦多内战期间游击队临时领土控制的经济、社会和政治后果。在此期间，游击队取代了国家当局，并创建了鼓励自治和自给自足的非正式制度。利用空间断点回归设计，我们表明，与邻近由国家控制的地区相比，曾受游击队控制的地区在过去20年中经历了更差的经济结果。在这些地区，较高的社会资本与负面经济后果并存。反叛制度作为国家的替代方案而发展起来，这一事实导致对外部人士的不信任，并使这些地区与该国其他地区隔离，导致过度依赖自给农业并与战后政府脱节。在反叛治理举措更强的地区，结果更为显著，并且尽管战后对前游击队地区的公共投资增加，这些结果并未逆转。本研究表明，当非国家行为者发展替代治理制度时，这些制度可能通过对群体外部的持久不信任规范引发不利的发展效应。

30487.title: Distinguishing Causes of Neighborhood Racial Change: A Nearest Neighbor Design
30487.zh_title: 区分社区种族变迁的原因：一种最近邻设计
30487.authors: Patrick Bayer, Marcus D. Casey, W. Ben McCartney, John Orellana-Li, Calvin S. Zhang
30487.abstract: We study neighborhood choice using a novel research design that contrasts the move rate of homeowners who receive a new different-race neighbor immediately next-door versus slightly further away on the same block. This approach isolates a component of household preferences directly attributable to their neighbors’ identities. Both Black and White homeowners are more likely to move after receiving a new different-race neighbor. These findings are robust to additional controls (e.g., income) and alternative research designs. We find evidence of heterogeneity in responses, especially associated with housing density, which has implications for understanding contemporary neighborhood racial change and the prospects for maintaining stable, integrated neighborhoods.
30487.zh_abstract: 我们使用一种新颖的研究设计来研究社区选择，该设计对比了那些在紧邻隔壁获得新不同种族邻居的房主，与在同一街区稍远位置获得新不同种族邻居的房主的搬迁率。这种方法分离出直接归因于邻居身份的家庭偏好成分。黑人和白人房主在获得新不同种族邻居后都更有可能搬迁。这些发现在加入额外控制变量（例如收入）和采用替代研究设计时依然稳健。我们发现了反应异质性的证据，特别是与住房密度相关的异质性，这对理解当代社区种族变迁以及维持稳定、融合社区的前景具有启示意义。

30486.title: It Hurts To Ask
30486.authors: Roland Bénabou, Ania Jaroszewicz, George Loewenstein
30486.abstract: We analyze the offering, asking, and granting of help or other benefits as a three-stage game with bilateral private information between a person in need of help and a potential help-giver. Asking entails the risk of rejection, which can be painful: since unawareness of the need can no longer be an excuse, a refusal reveals that the person in need, or the relationship, is not valued very much. We show that a failure to ask can occur even when most helpers would help if told about the need, and that even though a greater need makes help both more valuable and more likely to be granted, it can reduce the propensity to ask. When potential helpers concerned about the recipient’s ask-shyness can make spontaneous offers, this can be a double-edged sword: offering reveals a more caring type and helps solve the failure-to-ask problem, but not offering reveals a not-so-caring one, and this itself deters asking. This discouragement effect can also generate a trap where those in need hope for an offer while willing helpers hope for an ask, resulting in significant inefficiencies.
30486.zh_abstract: 我们分析提供、请求和给予帮助或其他利益的过程，将其视为一个在需要帮助的人和潜在帮助者之间具有双边私人信息的三阶段博弈。请求帮助伴随着被拒绝的风险，这可能是痛苦的：因为无法再以不知晓需求为借口，拒绝表明需要帮助的人或这段关系不被足够重视。我们表明，即使大多数帮助者在被告知需求后会提供帮助，也可能出现不开口请求的情况；并且，尽管更大的需求使帮助更有价值且更可能被授予，但它可能降低请求的倾向。当关心接受者请求羞怯的潜在帮助者可以主动提供帮助时，这可能是一把双刃剑：主动提供帮助揭示了一个更关心他人的类型，并有助于解决不开口请求的问题，但不主动提供帮助则揭示了一个不那么关心他人的类型，而这本身就会阻止请求。这种抑制效应还可能产生一种陷阱，即需要帮助的人希望得到主动提供，而愿意帮助的人则希望得到请求，从而导致显著的效率低下。
30486.meta: Programs：DEV, PE, POL；JEL：D03, D23, D64, D82, D83, D91

30485.title: Monetary and Financial Spillovers: New Historical Evidence from Germany
30485.zh_title: 货币与金融溢出效应：来自德国的新历史证据
30485.authors: James Cloyne, Patrick Hürtgen, Alan M. Taylor
30485.abstract: Using newly identified exogenous variation in German monetary policy from 580 policy meetings between 1974 and 1998, we provide new evidence on the role of the exchange rate regime in monetary spillovers. Germany played a central role in the European Monetary System over these decades. Following a German monetary tightening, European countries pegged to the Deutschmark experienced unchanged nominal exchange rates, higher short-term interest rates and sizable economic contractions. In contrast, floating exchange rate economies in Europe saw a sizable depreciation of their currency vis-á-vis Germany, but limited short-run movements in interest rates, activity or prices. U.S. monetary tightenings had similar effects on both Deutschmark pegs and floats. Our findings are consistent with the predictions of the trilemma.
30485.zh_abstract: 利用1974年至1998年间580次政策会议中新识别的德国货币政策外生变动，我们提供了关于汇率制度在货币溢出效应中作用的新证据。在这几十年间，德国在欧洲货币体系中扮演了核心角色。在德国货币紧缩之后，与德国马克挂钩的欧洲国家经历了名义汇率不变、短期利率上升以及显著的经济收缩。相比之下，欧洲的浮动汇率经济体经历了其货币相对于德国马克的大幅贬值，但利率、经济活动或价格在短期内的变动有限。美国的货币紧缩对德国马克的挂钩国和浮动国都有类似的影响。我们的发现与“三难困境”的预测一致。
